programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Three G's
programme.desc: The search is on for one of Chicago's most wanted after several dead teenage girls turn up in a Chinatown factory.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Number of Rats

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: There's My Girl

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Push the Pain Away

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Life Is Fluid

programme.title: Movie: Moana

programme.desc: A princess sets out to find her sister, the Queen, so she can put an end to the spell that was accidentally cast, putting their kingdom frozen in eternal winter.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Strange Bedfellows
programme.desc: Blanche is exposed in the newspaper entering the home of a local married politician.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Brotherly Love
programme.desc: Blanche makes a move at Ted, Stan's brother, the minute she learns he's a neurosurgeon. She is furious when she discovers the only woman Ted is apparently interested in is Dorothy. Meanwhile, Rose is suffering from insomnia.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: A Visit From Little Sven
programme.desc: Rose's cousin Sven, arrives in Miami for a visit just prior to him being married by arrangement. However, when Blanche plays a trick on her latest beau, which involves Sven, the naive groom falls for her.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Audit
programme.desc: Dorothy is stunned to learn that Stan's tax problems are her tax problems since Stan is being audited for a number of years when they were still married. Meanwhile, Blanche and Rose take a Spanish class, each for different reasons.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Three on a Couch
programme.desc: Constant bickering causes the girls to seek help from a therapist. This prompts the girls to reminisce about times they didn't get along. The therapist's conclusion: they should not live with one another.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Charlie's Buddy
programme.desc: A wartime buddy of Rose's late husband arrives in Miami to see Rose. However, he has more in mind than just a friendly visit. Meanwhile, Dorothy and Blanche haggle over the same dress to wear to a social event.

programme.title: Frasier: Dark Victory
programme.desc: Frasier is looking forward to a quiet weekend at home but ends up helping everyone else.

programme.title: Frasier: She's the Boss
programme.desc: Frasier holds his ground when the new station manager orders him to make show changes.

programme.title: Frasier: Shrink Rap
programme.desc: Frasier and Niles consult a family therapist after their disastrous attempt to go into private practice together.

programme.title: Frasier: Martin Does It His Way
programme.desc: A loathsome, late great aunt leaves a legacy requesting that Frasier deliver her eulogy.

programme.title: Frasier: Leapin' Lizards
programme.desc: Frasier seeks retaliation for Bulldog's on-air jokes, landing Kate in the hospital.

programme.title: Frasier: Kisses Sweeter Than Wine
programme.desc: Frasier's home needs minor repair work before he hosts a wine-tasting party for his club.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: The Ricardos Visit Cuba
programme.desc: The Ricardos go to Cuba and Ricky wants to introduce his relatives to his wife and son.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Little Ricky's School Pageant
programme.desc: A lavish children's pageant in the Enchanted Forest is complete with Lucy as a witch.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Lucy and the Loving Cup
programme.desc: Ricky's disapproval of Lucy's new hat leads her to try on a loving cup bra for size.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Lucy and Superman
programme.desc: Lucy looks for unusual entertainment to lure children to Little Ricky's birthday party.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Artist
programme.desc: Dorothy, Blanche and Rose all agree to pose for the Hungarian sculptor Laszlo.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Blanche's Little Girl
programme.desc: Blanche is thrilled by a visit from her daughter, Rebecca, an ex-model who has now gained quite a bit of weight. Also visiting with Rebecca is her oafish beau who constantly puts down her weight.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Dorothy's New Friend
programme.desc: Dorothy befriends a novelist, Barbara Thorndyke, and she quickly infringes on Dorothy's relationship with Blanche and Rose, who think Barbara is nothing but a stuck up snob.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Grab That Dough
programme.desc: The girls fly to Los Angeles to appear on their favourite game show.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: My Brother My Father
programme.desc: Sophia's brother, Angelo, a priest, is coming to Miami for a visit and he doesn't know Dorothy and Stan are divorced. So in order to spare his feelings, Sophia convinces Dorothy and Stan to pretend to be married.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Accurate Conception
programme.desc: Blanche's daughter, Rebecca, has some wonderful news. She's going to become a mother through artificial insemination. However, Blanche is less than thrilled and totally against the entire idea.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Meet Rachael Leigh Cook from 'Love, Guaranteed,' Ryan McPartlin from 'LA's Finest,' and cook with Chef Marcela Valladolid.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Sit down with actress Bo Derek from the Hallmark Movies & Mysteries original movie 'JL Family Ranch: The Wedding Gift, and with actor Mena Massoud from 'Aladdin.'

programme.title: Movie: Winter Love Story
programme.desc: An author publishes her first novel, but it fails to sell well so she embarks on a book tour. While on tour, she meets a handsome fantasy-author that helps boost her sales, and a romance quickly follows.

programme.title: Movie: Perfect Match
programme.desc: When an engaged couple can't agree on anything, the mother of the groom hires a wedding planner and an event planner to help. The two planners are as different as night and day, but they soon learn opposites do indeed attract.

programme.title: Movie: Austin Powers: The Spy Who Shagged Me
programme.desc: A groovy spy travels back in time to stop his arch nemesis from taking over the world.

programme.title: South Park: Scott Tenorman Must Die
programme.desc: Cartman is excited that he has finally entered puberty when he gets pubes of his very own. After the other boys explain that pubes don't count unless you grow them, Cartman realizes he been tricked and sets in motion a dastardly plot for revenge.

programme.title: South Park: Asspen
programme.desc: While the adults are trapped at a time-share sales meeting, Stan is challenged by the best skier on the mountain to compete for the prettiest girl's affections.

programme.title: South Park: Casa Bonita
programme.desc: Kyle chooses Stan, Kenny and Butters to celebrate his birthday at Casa Bonita. When Cartman finds out he's not invited, he arranges for Butters to conveniently go 'missing.'

programme.title: South Park: Elementary School Musical
programme.desc: The boys must embrace the latest fad to hit South Park Elementary or risk their status as the coolest kids in school.

programme.title: South Park: Timmy! 2000
programme.desc: When Timmy is diagnosed with Attention Deficit Disorder, it triggers a wave of prescription drug abuse at South Park Elementary. With all the spare time he has now, Timmy joins a rock band as the lead singer.

programme.title: South Park: Chickenlover
programme.desc: During a crime spree, Barbrady is forced to admit he can't read and must return to school. Anarchy ensues when the town realizes they are without law enforcement, so Barbrady makes the boys deputies to help keep the peace.

programme.title: South Park: Sexual Harassment Panda
programme.desc: After Sexual Harassment Panda 'educates' the children, Cartman sues Stan for sexual harassment, and a flurry of other lawsuits follow.

programme.title: South Park: You Got F'd in the A
programme.desc: Stan just got served, and now it's up to him to put together a team of South Park's best dancers to compete against a troupe from Orange County.

programme.title: South Park: Christian Rock Hard
programme.desc: When the other boys kick Cartman out of their band, he pulls his own group together to make music for Jesus.

programme.title: South Park: Towelie
programme.desc: When the government steals their new Gamesphere, the boys will stop at nothing to get it back. There is also a new dysfunctional character in South Park who tries to recruit the boys to his cause.

programme.title: South Park: It Hits the Fan
programme.desc: When the HBC Network allows a show to utter curse words on the air, it threatens to destroy the world. It's up to the Knights of Standards and Practices, as well as Cartman, Stan, Kyle and Kenny, to censor the airwaves and save the world.

programme.title: South Park: Trapped in the Closet
programme.desc: Scientologists converge on Stan's house after he is identified as the reincarnation of L. Ron Hubbard. One A-lister locks himself in the closet and refuses to come out, after Stan criticizes his 'talent.'

programme.title: South Park: Bebe's Boobs Destroy Society
programme.desc: Bebe is the first girl in the fourth grade to 'develop.' Her new little breasts inspire a primate-like reaction from all the boys in class that threatens their friendship and society in general.

programme.title: South Park: Pinewood Derby
programme.desc: Randy has a plan that will assure Stan a first place trophy in this year's Pinewood Derby. When they accidentally break warp speed, the town is visited and held hostage by an alien gangster.

programme.title: South Park: Royal Pudding
programme.desc: The Prince of Canada is about to take a Princess and Ike is obsessed with the Royal Wedding.

programme.title: South Park: Sexual Healing
programme.desc: The latest in scientific testing reveals that some of the boys at South Park Elementary have a sex addiction problem.

programme.title: South Park: Time to Get Cereal
programme.desc: South Park citizens are in danger and the boys realize that only Al Gore can help.

programme.title: South Park: Nobody Got Cereal?
programme.desc: The boys break out of jail and are on the run from the police and ManBearPig.

programme.title: South Park: Ginger Cow
programme.desc: Cartman's latest prank brings peace to the world.

programme.title: South Park: Grounded Vindaloop
programme.desc: Butters is convinced he's living in a virtual reality.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: See One, Do One, Teach One
programme.desc: Detective Rizzoli and medical examiner Isles investigate the grisly murder of a wealthy couple. The M.O. matches the work of a serial killer known as the Surgeon. Now that the Surgeon is behind bars, it seems a protégé is picking up where he left off.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Boston Strangler Redux
programme.desc: Tensions are high as the squad investigates a possible copycat of the legendary Boston Strangler.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Sympathy for the Devil
programme.desc: Jane and Maura investigate the mysterious death of a young boy who may have died during an attempted exorcism.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: She Works Hard for the Money
programme.desc: After a student is gunned down in broad daylight, the investigation reveals she had more than a few secrets. Meanwhile, Jane's mother Angela gets into a spat with her father over the car.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Money for Nothing
programme.desc: The eldest brother in a Boston Brahmin family is found in the harbour dead after an apparent sailing accident. Maura's close connection with the family and Jane's resentment over their wealth threaten to derail the investigation.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: I Kissed a Girl
programme.desc: Jane and Maura investigate what appears to be a hate crime: the brutal assault and murder of a woman leaving a lesbian bar. With Jane going undercover, they hope to lure the killer out in the open.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Boston Marathon: The Manhunt (Part 2)
programme.desc: With the Boston Bombing suspects identified as domestic terrorist brothers, the manhunt begins, a terrifying crime spree ensues, and new information sheds light on the heinous crime.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Atlanta Serial Killer: Do You Know Where Your Children Are? (Part 1)
programme.desc: From 1979 to 1981, more than two dozen of Atlanta’s black children, mostly boys and young men, disappeared without a trace. Someone was killing the city's most vulnerable children for an unknown reason.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Atlanta Serial Killer: The KKK Connection? (Part 2)
programme.desc: Investigators believe Wayne Williams, a 23-year-old black man, murdered more than two dozen black children and young men in Atlanta. The 40 year-old evidence is re-examined using modern forensics in search of more answers.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Aaron Hernandez: Secrets and Lies
programme.desc: Aaron Hernandez is a star player for the New England Patriots, and is set up for greatness. But after a body is found riddled with bullets a short distance from his home, forensic evidence soon ties Hernandez to the killing.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: James Jordan: Vanished
programme.desc: When in 1993, James Raymond Jordan Sr. goes missing and his luxury car is found stripped and abandoned in North Carolina, clues point to a tragic crime.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Susan Smith: Someone Stole My Babies (Part 1)
programme.desc: A deep look at some of the most notorious crimes and mysteries of our time.

programme.desc: When in 1993, James Raymond Jordan Sr. goes missing and his luxury car is found stripped and abandoned in North Carolina, clues point to a tragic crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Hearted
programme.desc: After a man dies with no proof of foul play, investigators learn that another man died the exact same way six years earlier. The men had one thing in common: at the time of their deaths, they were married to the same woman.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wheel of Misfortune
programme.desc: A woman's disappearance is tracked by a casino's security cameras. Investigators collect enough evidence left behind from the victim to inform them of who was responsible and how she disappeared.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Covet Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: Olamide Elizabeth Adeyooye, a science major has been missing for 48 hrs, and her family grows increasingly concerned.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Writing on the Wall

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bitter Brew
programme.desc: When the head of the Coors Brewing Company is kidnapped and held for ransom, it kicked off one of the most intense manhunts in American history. See how forensic science helped track down the kidnappers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Message in a Bottle
programme.desc: When an attractive young Missouri woman is found dead in her apartment, police meticulously generate a suspect list a mile long. The culprit turns out to be the most unlikely suspect with an insatiable lust for power and control.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hair Line
programme.desc: Doctors don't know why the young scientist is gravely ill. When tests finally reveal the cause, it's too late to save him. Police hope that lab analysis of his hair - showing when attempts were made on his life and what was used - will lead to the killer.

programme.desc: A bullet-riddled car, a missing driver and no witnesses poses a mystery, until a tiny and unique clue is found.

programme.desc: Ted Bundy helped prepare his own defense, but would his amateur lawyering help him beat the rap or send him to the electric chair?

programme.desc: Ted Bundy maintains his innocence. But as the clock wound down on his final death warrant, Ted Bundy made a last desperate attempt to save his own life he: began to talk.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Drowning Sorrows
programme.desc: A family vacation turns tragic when a family matriarch suffers a tragic fall to her death. The circumstances surround the fall lead the investigators to think foul play was involved. Findings from a pathologist confirm their doubts.

programme.title: Forensic Files: As Fault
programme.desc: A young mother goes missing after a night out. Police suspect foul play and begin looking into the woman's strained family life for answers. When the case goes from missing persons to homicide, a man claims an accident was to blame.

programme.desc: When the ranch comes under fire from encroaching hunters, Gabe takes it upon himself to learn to ride a horse as the family constructs a fence around the property. And later, Gabe and Raquell leave the mountain for the birth of their baby girl.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: A Bottle for Your Thoughts
programme.desc: Bear overnights in the wild as he absorbs life-changing news. A gentler Bam takes the lead on a critical next step of the main house build, while Noah creates a Bush Monster Plow to clear heavy snow. Sister Bird makes an unusual gift for Gabe.

programme.desc: Chad uses a station wagon to create a space-age drag car. The car must be suitable for space travel with wings, in-line seating, and capped off by an 18-inch bubble.

programme.title: Bad Chad Customs: Dirty Hands, Clean Money
programme.desc: The cut rate supercharger Colton brought in threatens to derail to entire build of the custom dragster with bubble top, wings, and inline seating.

programme.title: Bad Chad Customs: For Kings and Queens

programme.title: Bad Chad Customs: Cooler Than Dangit

programme.title: Bad Chad Customs: They Call Me Bad Chad

programme.title: Bad Chad Customs: You Use What You Got

programme.title: Bad Chad Customs: Chad vs. Pinto
programme.desc: Chad takes on his most ambitious build yet: transforming a rusted-out 1971 Pinto into a European-style performance car framed in glass. With only four weeks to work and a mountain of problems facing him, Chad risks missing a deadline for the first time.

programme.title: Bad Chad Customs: Performance Pinto

programme.desc: An empty-nester couple decides to make a new home in San Carlos, Mexico. They're looking for water views with a minimum of two bedrooms and he needs an office space for work, but she's concerned with having a separate dining area for entertaining.

programme.title: Caribbean Life: Cooking Up a Bed and Breakfast on St. Croix
programme.desc: An adventurous couple relocates to St. Croix to open a small bed and breakfast. Since he's a chef, he wants an updated kitchen, and she is looking for a water view to enjoy a more relaxed lifestyle.

programme.title: Caribbean Life: Making a Splash on Utila
programme.desc: A couple from Massachusetts wants to be able to enjoy boating 365 days a year on Utila. She's hoping to find a large home with room for their five kids, while he's focused on finding a waterfront property.

programme.title: Caribbean Life: Slowing Down in Anguilla
programme.desc: After 20 years of 14-hour days, a hardworking couple trades Pennsylvania snow for the tropical waters of Anguilla. They hope to find a dream home with ocean views, a modern style and an outdoor shower.

programme.title: Caribbean Life: Reeling in The Good Life
programme.desc: A Tennessee couple with eight kids wants a slower pace of life in the Dominican Republic. They frequently visit the island for work and are looking for a large home that comes with a pool and soaking tub in the sleepy beach town of Juan Dolio.

programme.title: Renovation Inc.: Starting Off Rocky
programme.desc: Bryan and Sarah's largest client build gets off to a rough start. Then, the couple meets their most demanding client to date.

programme.title: Renovation Island: Bottoms Up
programme.desc: The Baeumlers navigate a new learning curve in hospitality as their build transitions to a business. Sarah and Bryan argue over projects that are still not finished, despite their ticking timeline.

programme.title: Renovation Island: This Build Is a Beach
programme.desc: Tension runs high as the Baeumlers begin landscaping. Sarah tells Bryan she needs a break from the build. On their one year anniversary of living on the island, Bryan and Sarah look back at how their renovation project has evolved.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: Baby's Due Date Causes Rush to Renovate an Outdated Ranch
programme.desc: New parents' new arrival determines deadline for Chip and Jo's finished fixer.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: Searching for a New Homebuilder's Dream Home in an Old Neighborhood
programme.desc: Chip and Joanna Gaines take Genny and Russ Davis on a tour through three homes in Woodway, Texas. Woodway is considered 'upper-crust', an established neighborhood with older homes, large trees and massive yards.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: Coffeehouse Owners Seek Home With Short Commute
programme.desc: Chip and Joanna Gaines take clients Kimberly and Blake Batson on a tour through three houses in Waco, Texas. The young newlyweds run the 'Common Grounds' coffee shop and are looking for a home close to their business.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: Almost Empty Nesters Want Waterfront Home

programme.title: Fixer Upper: An Old Friend Who Returns to Waco Hopes to Find a Family-Friendly Fixer Upper

programme.title: Fixer Upper: A College Chaplain Seeks Home to Keep the Peace

programme.title: Pawn Stars: London Pawning
programme.desc: Rick takes a trip to England to visit his buddy's pawn shop. Back in Las Vegas, someone wants to buy Rick's favourite mini-bike. Later, Rick finds some rare maps of Nevada and North America.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: What You Talkin' 'Bout Sturgis?
programme.desc: The team gives Chumlee a customized Harley-Davidson FXR for his 30th birthday.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Sturgis and Acquisitions
programme.desc: The crew heads to the annual Sturgis Motorcycle Rally while the Old Man and Olivia hold down the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Stick to Your Guns
programme.desc: The guys check out a flag cut straight from a WWI fighter plane, and Rick checks out a gun that belonged to Old West lawman Fred Coates.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: You're Out
programme.desc: Rick and Chumlee check out a 1969 Camaro Z28 that is in nearly mint condition. Then, a first edition baseball scorebook from 1878 is brought into the shop. Later, Corey visits a financial adviser to help reign in his wild spending habits.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Everyday I'm Shufflin'
programme.desc: The guys check out a popular 1950s bar game, a bowling machine called "Shuffle Alley," but they struggle to keep negotiations out of the gutter. Also, an official prop from the legendary movie 'The Godfather' is up for grabs.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Chum of All Fears
programme.desc: Corey and Chumlee try to pull off the perfect duo Halloween costume. Also, Corey checks out a 1933 Plymouth and a guy brings a 1977 Mattel Electronic Football Game in.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Rough and Tumble
programme.desc: Rick checks out some items signed by 'Grizzly Adams' actor Dan Haggerty. Then, a piece of flag carried by Teddy Roosevelt's Rough Riders flies into the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Rock Bottom
programme.desc: Hit rough terrain with the Pawn Stars when Rick bumps into a vehicle known as a rock crawler. Will he steer this off-roading dream machine home or will negotiations hit rock bottom?

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Brew Master
programme.desc: A medal believed to be a Polish White Eagle soars into the shop and Rick must decide whether to go all in or sit this one out. Corey and Chumlee race to check out a brick from the Indianapolis Motor Speedway. Later, Chumlee attempts the perfect home brew.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Chum's Revenge
programme.desc: Rick checks out a 1956 Buick known as the ultimate family wagon. Then, Rick teaches Corey to be 'a believer' when a Neil Diamond jacket flashes into the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Trading Up
programme.desc: An original sketch from 'Rocky and Bullwinkle' is brought into the shop. Then, Rick is presented with what is believed to be a first edition of Richard Nixon's memoirs.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Live Long and Prosper
programme.desc: The shop gets its hands on an Eli Whitney Civil War revolver and a signed picture of the original Star Trek cast. Then, Chumlee decides to unfriend Corey in real life when Corey unfriends him on social media.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Penny for your Pawn
programme.desc: A 1930s Gottlieb grip tester and a limited edition piece of art by actor Anthony Quinn arrive at the shop. Also, Chum offers to help promote the shop by trying to make images of Old Man go viral.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Napoleon Bonapawn
programme.desc: A rare Rolling Stones record makes its way to the shop. Corey tackles a football that was used in the first Hall of Fame game. Then, Rick's on guard when three swords from the Napoleonic era arrive. Later, Chum gets animated with Donald Duck model sheets.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Promissory Pawn
programme.desc: A water propelled jetpack; a promissory note from the Mexican-American War;a statue of the Hindu god Shiva.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Lock, Stock, and Pawn
programme.desc: An all-star Dodger's baseball memorabilia bench, a 19th century Hobbs & Co. lock box, an original Woody Woodpecker oil painting, and a set of educational books called the Delphian Course.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: No Pawn for You!
programme.desc: A chair belonging to Abraham Lincoln; a vintage Nintendo Donkey Kong arcade game; a signed Seinfeld script; a brigade of antique firefighting buckets.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Smokin' Pawn
programme.desc: A 1944 steel cent rolls into the shop, and an 1850s calendar clock shows up. Later, things heat up with a Smokey the Bear puppet blazes in.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Poképawn
programme.desc: A valuable and rare Pokémon collection finds its way to the shop and a battle ensues to determine if it's worth a buy. Also, a 1926 Dunhill Watch Lighter looks for a home in the shop.

programme.title: Movie: Now, Voyager
programme.desc: When a sheltered spinster decides to make radical changes to her life, she decides to take a cruise. While on the cruise, she falls in love with a married man and becomes a surrogate mother to his daughter.

programme.title: Movie: Executive Suite
programme.desc: A furniture-store executive's sudden death results in a fierce power struggle between his five vice-presidents who each want to replace him.

programme.title: Movie: Island in the Sun
programme.desc: A black man returns to his home on a Caribbean island. His political beliefs are confused after he becomes involved with the daughter of a plantation owner.

programme.title: Movie: The Decks Ran Red
programme.desc: Two murderous mutineers conspire to kill the first mate who has taken over a ship.

programme.title: Movie: Our Modern Maidens
programme.desc: An engaged woman falls for a diplomat while her fiancée impregnates her best friend.

programme.title: Movie: Black Orpheus
programme.desc: A man uses supernatural methods to revive his love after she is killed by an ex-lover.

programme.title: Movie: Orpheus
programme.desc: The legend of Orpheus is retold in the idiom of postwar France.

programme.title: Movie: Not So Dumb
programme.desc: A scatterbrained miss throws a big party to advance her boyfriend's career.

programme.title: Movie: Street Scene
programme.desc: The lives of eight neighbouring Manhattan families intertwine on the streets of New York.

programme.title: Movie: Bird of Paradise
programme.desc: A young woman is going to be sacrificed to the volcanic gods to save her people.

programme.title: Movie: Our Daily Bread
programme.desc: Unable to make ends meet in the big city, a couple takes over an abandoned farm.

programme.title: Movie: Northwest Passage
programme.desc: In 1759, a determined major sets out to find the Northwest Passage to the Pacific Ocean.

programme.title: Movie: H.M. Pulham, Esq.
programme.desc: A successful businessman remembers how his ascension to the top was difficult and costly.

programme.title: Movie: The Fountainhead
programme.desc: An idealistic architect battles corrupt business interests and his love for a married woman.

programme.title: Jessie: The Jessie-nator: Grudgement Day
programme.desc: Future Jessie appears from an elevator time machine to warn present Jessie to run for her life. She tells Jessie that when Ravi grows up, he invents a robot version of Bertram which tries to destroy Jessie and take over the world.

programme.title: Jessie: Somebunny's in Trouble
programme.desc: When Zuri loses interest in bunnysitting her class pet, Jessie steps in, only to lose the rabbit. Meanwhile, Emma has a crush on a school jock and enlists Luke’s help to learn more about sports.

programme.title: Jessie: Throw Momma from the Terrace
programme.desc: Jessie invites Bertram's mom to visit as a surprise for his birthday. However, unbeknownst to Jessie, Bertram and his mom do not get along. Meanwhile, Ravi and Luke compete in a school egg-drop competition.

programme.title: Jessie: We Don't Need No Stinkin' Badges
programme.desc: Jessie offers to help Zuri earn Butterfly Scout troop badges during a Central Park camping trip. Meanwhile, Luke convinces Ravi that lying is a super power.

programme.title: Movie: Toy Story 2
programme.desc: When an obsessive toy collector kidnaps Woody, it's up to Buzz Lightyear and the rest of Andy's toys -- Mr. Potato Head, Slinky Dog, Rex, and Hamm -- to save their pal from being put on display as a museum piece.

programme.title: Movie: Toy Story 3
programme.desc: Just before Andy leaves for college, his toys are mistakenly brought to a day care centre. Woody fights to convince the others that they were not abandoned and plans a way for them to get home.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Who da Boss? Lou da Boss!
programme.desc: It's a new summer at Camp Kikiwaka as Lou takes over as camp director and welcomes new camper Gwen and camp counselors Noah and Ava.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Kikiwaka's Got Talent
programme.desc: Finn and Matteo's friendship is tested as they try to figure out an act for Camp Kikiwaka's annual talent show; Destiny tries to impress Noah with her pageant skills.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Yes, Lies and Tower Escape
programme.desc: After Gwen accidentally breaks a window, she and Destiny get caught in a web of lies. Noah challenges Ava to be open to more things by saying 'yes and...' to opportunities.

programme.title: Jessie: Break-Up and Shape-Up
programme.desc: Jessie becomes threatened when Tony has to train a beautiful girl named Victoria as a doorman. Things get messy when Jessie's old boyfriend Ted comes to town and she finds herself attracted to him.

programme.title: Jessie: Diary of a Mad Newswoman
programme.desc: Things become intense when Bryn comes back to be Emma's co-anchor at school. Meanwhile, when Jessie finds out Zuri is snooping through her diary, she teaches her a lesson.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Tidal Wave

programme.desc: When Scrat accidentally sets of a chain of events that cause a meteor storm to head toward Earth, it is up to the old gang to save the planet. Sid, Manny, and Diego go on an epic adventure to find clues to stop the meteor and save the world.

programme.title: Movie: Ferdinand
programme.desc: Raised from a calf by a young girl, Ferdinand is a massive bull whose physical size is rivalled only by the size of his heart. When the bovine is mistakenly thought to be an aggressive beast, he's captured and forced to fight against his will.

programme.title: Movie: Rambo III
programme.desc: John Rambo, unwilling to accompany old friend Colonel Trautman behind Soviet lines in Afghanistan, ends up going there on an unofficial rescue mission after Trautman is captured.

programme.title: Movie: First Blood
programme.desc: Wandering into a small town, ex-Green Beret John Rambo is targeted, arrested and abused by the local police. When he escapes, Rambo flashes back to his time as a POW and heads into the hills, armed to the teeth and ready to take on those who hunt him.

programme.title: Top Gear

programme.desc: Find out how pistons, paint rollers, parachutes and chimneys are made.

programme.desc: Nails and staples, safety glasses, fabrics, bicycles -- find out how each of these every day items are made and put together.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Mystery of the Cursed Pharaoh
programme.desc: Expert archaeologists use cutting edge technology and the latest science to investigate the remains of Tutankhamun to reveal how the ancient Egyptian pharaoh's allegedly incestuous heritage may have played in his mysterious downfall.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Island of Arctic Cannibals
programme.desc: Three graves are discovered on the frozen beach of an uninhabited Arctic island, and the mummified corpses inside may answer a centuries-old mystery of an expedition that was literally consumed by the cannibalistic insanity of its mutinous crew.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Mystery of Skeleton Lake
programme.desc: A frozen lake deep in the Himalayas melts once a year to expose hundreds of human bones and a centuries-old mystery of astonishing carnage, leaving experts to speculate if it was a single catastrophic event or something much more sinister.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Secrets of the Scorpion King
programme.desc: New evidence suggests that the mythological Scorpion King might have actually existed. New discoveries might answer this ancient mystery, and experts use modern-day tech to reveal more of Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Island of Arctic Cannibals
programme.desc: Three graves are discovered on the frozen beach of an uninhabited Arctic island, and the mummified corpses inside may answer a centuries-old mystery of an expedition that was literally consumed by the cannibalistic insanity of its mutinous crew.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Mystery of Skeleton Lake
programme.desc: A frozen lake deep in the Himalayas melts once a year to expose hundreds of human bones and a centuries-old mystery of astonishing carnage, leaving experts to speculate if it was a single catastrophic event or something much more sinister.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Curse of the Crocodile Queen
programme.desc: The Crocodile Queen was Egypt's first female pharaoh, but we don't who she was, or why she took this sinister alter-ego. New discoveries might finally answer this ancient mystery, and more of Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Hitler's Forbidden Island
programme.desc: New discoveries on a strange fortified island reveal the terrifying truth behind Hitler's secret plan to win World War II at all costs, and using the latest science and tech, experts investigate what really happened here.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: The Devil's Lair
programme.desc: When a top-secret Nazi base is discovered in France decades after the war ends, experts use cutting-edge tech to reveal the secrets of this deadly compound; what they find could change everything we know about D-Day and the last stand of the Nazi regime.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Conspiracy on Death Island
programme.desc: A strange, abandoned mansion on a remote island is central to countless conspiracy theories, and new discoveries reveal if this eerie site was a secret Nazi base intended for a sinister mission.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: The Doomsday Castle
programme.desc: An abandoned eerie structure in France could have doomed the Allies in World War II, and new discoveries at this mysterious site reveal the truth behind top-secret Nazi plans to unleash apocalyptic destruction.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Mystery of the Nazi Nukes
programme.desc: When a secret bunker and a vast network of tunnels are discovered after World War II, experts use cutting-edge tech to uncover if the high levels of radiation in the area could be connected to a classified Nazi nuclear program.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Hitler's Invisible City
programme.desc: As the Soviet Army pushes the Nazis out of Poland, they discover a massive city of over a thousand buildings that was unknown to the Allies, and using the latest science, experts reveal how Hitler was able to keep this sinister place hidden for so long.

programme.title: Unearthed: Seven Wonders of The Pyramids
programme.desc: Investigators use cutting-edge tech to explore seven ancient pyramids from around the world; as experts explore their lost labyrinths and alien relics, they discover unexplained connections between cultures thousands of miles and years apart.

programme.title: Unearthed: Seven Wonders of Rome
programme.desc: Cutting-edge archaeological methods help experts unearth the dark secrets hidden at seven wonders of ancient Rome. What they find challenges everything we know about this once-mighty empire.

programme.title: Unearthed: Seven Wonders of Ancient America
programme.desc: America before Columbus was home to some of the greatest engineering marvels on the planet. Special access to hi-tech archaeological digs reveals the secrets of ancient America's Seven Wonders as experts investigate their mysterious purposes.

programme.title: Unearthed: Seven Wonders of Egypt
programme.desc: Seven wonders of ancient Egypt are home to mysteries still unsolved thousands of years after their construction, and today, investigators use cutting-edge tech and forensic analysis to reveal new secrets of these colossal engineering marvels.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Killing Field
programme.desc: The parents of a young South Carolina couple are terrified when they go missing in 2016. Detectives find a clue that leads to strange storage container in the middle of 95 acres. What's inside unlocks secrets of a monster hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Fatal Family Secrets
programme.desc: A celebratory night turns deadly for the Whitaker family when they are gunned down at home. When investigators uncover a conspiracy, it will test one man's ability to forgive as he fights to save the criminal mastermind from the death penalty.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Unicorn Killer
programme.desc: A Philadelphia woman disappears in the fall of 1977. Later, police come to learn the terrifying truth about her whereabouts, but struggle to locate and bring in her killer.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Suburban Secrets
programme.desc: When doting mother, Cheryl Coker, vanishes from Riverside, Ohio on October 2nd 2018 numerous search efforts come up empty. But as police take a closer look at the case, they uncover some disturbing information.

programme.title: Joe Exotic: Tigers, Lies and Cover-Up: Secrets Uncaged
programme.desc: As Joe Exotic fights to get out of prison, the jury foreman exclusively speaks out, while a private investigation focuses on missing Don Lewis's will, his handyman's actions, and the whereabouts of his body and a meat grinder.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Without A Trace
programme.desc: In 1984 ten-year-old Kevin Collins disappears on his way home and the city of San Francisco is galvanized in an effort to find him. With few leads to go on, Kevin's case sheds light on hundreds of other kids who have vanished without a trace in the U.S.

programme.title: Joe Exotic: Tigers, Lies and Cover-Up: Secrets Uncaged
programme.desc: As Joe Exotic fights to get out of prison, the jury foreman exclusively speaks out, while a private investigation focuses on missing Don Lewis's will, his handyman's actions, and the whereabouts of his body and a meat grinder.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Fatal Family Secrets
programme.desc: A celebratory night turns deadly for the Whitaker family when they are gunned down at home. When investigators uncover a conspiracy, it will test one man's ability to forgive as he fights to save the criminal mastermind from the death penalty.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Unicorn Killer
programme.desc: A Philadelphia woman disappears in the fall of 1977. Later, police come to learn the terrifying truth about her whereabouts, but struggle to locate and bring in her killer.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: The Body in the Swamp
programme.desc: Miami businessman Henry Diaz goes missing the night before a family vacation. His business success has earned him many enemies… even within his own family. But before police can figure out who killed Henry Diaz, they'll need to find his body.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Prescription for Murder
programme.desc: Wisconsin police are shocked in 2010 to find an elderly couple brutally murdered in their home. When family and neighbors start receiving death threats, police fear the killer isn't done. Can they solve the case before they strike again?

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Blizzard of Bullets
programme.desc: During chilling winter nights in Idaho, a madman is on the prowl... attacking citizens in a crime spree that stuns families and terrifies whole communities. Investigators must race against time to catch a killer... who kills for the thrill of it.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Lamb Among Wolves
programme.desc: When a beautiful model is found dead in her Washington state home, family members fear for her missing daughter. Police have no shortage of suspects - and two sets of DNA at the scene. They must sort through twisting lies to uncover the dark truth.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Mountain Man
programme.desc: The backwoods brush of Chulitna is the perfect spot for rafting, panning for gold, fishing, and murder. When one couple is reported missing, troopers discover they’re the victims of cold-blooded murder and must begin a manhunt for the killer.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Winter's Nightmare
programme.desc: An entire family vanishes in the dead of winter from Nebraska. Have they suddenly decided to skip town, or has something far worse happened? A daughter's relentless search helps cops uncover a sinister and deadly plot fueled by revenge and greed.

programme.title: Dead of Winter: The Empty Chair
programme.desc: The day after a snowstorm, high school freshman Shaun Ouillette vanishes. His mother searches for three desperate weeks. But when an anonymous letter leads detectives into the frozen woods, they make a discovery that will tear the small town apart.

programme.title: Dead of Winter: Nightmare in North Dakota
programme.desc: After a blizzard, a son visits his parents, only to find them heinously murdered. Detectives discover a crime scene hopelessly compromised. They soon cross paths with a peculiar local, who may know what happened during the snowstorm.

programme.title: Dead of Winter: Last Christmas
programme.desc: Weeks after the Christmas disappearance of 22-year-old Dean Fawcett, detectives discover a headless body in the snow. A handwritten note points to a dangerous set of suspects, setting investigators on a cross-country manhunt to unravel the truth.

programme.title: Dead of Winter: Winter's Bone
programme.desc: A pastor discovers a bartender's strangled corpse in the snow, just days before Christmas. Suspicion turns toward the bartender's best friend, but detectives aren't quite sure.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Daddy's Got A Gun
programme.desc: A decorated police officer and single father relies on his kind and generous neighbors to help care for his beloved daughter. When she accuses one of them of molesting her, anger boils over, all hell breaks loose... and blood flows in the streets.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Tunnel of Hate
programme.desc: An industrious woman and an ambitious man become neighbors when they buy adjoining houses. Both intend to restore the derelict homes to former glory, but when one of the renovations falls badly behind, it leads to conflict and a shocking murder.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Rural Madness
programme.desc: Differences over how to enjoy life in a peaceful, rural neighborhood quickly escalate into a feud that comes to a bloody end on the road where it began.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: The Industry of War
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to rebuild Germany's military strength after the destruction of almost all its weaponry in the First World War. To overcome his country's dire shortage of raw materials, he plans to steal them from other countries.

programme.title: Hitler: The Actor
programme.desc: Investigates Hitler's breathtaking rise from election defeat in 1928 to Germany's Messiah in 1933. Experts analyze his speeches, dissect his PR gift and interrogate the mind of a man who ruthlessly executes his closest comrade.

programme.title: Hitler: The Victor
programme.desc: A look at Hitler's transformation from Fuhrer of the German people into the megalomaniac Nazi Messiah who triggers the global carnage of World War II.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Overlord
programme.desc: By early 1944, Hitler faced a new threat. In the West, Allied preparations to invade northwest France were coming to a climax. It was an attack he had long been expecting. His problem was knowing when and where it would come.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: The Industry of War
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to rebuild Germany's military strength after the destruction of almost all its weaponry in the First World War. To overcome his country's dire shortage of raw materials, he plans to steal them from other countries.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Retreat from Reality
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler is determined to fight to the very end, even if it costs millions of Germans their lives. He puts his faith in his the 'Wunderwaffe' and the 'wonder weapons,' including the first ever ballistic missile, the V2.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Bombing the Reich
programme.desc: Devastation touches the civilians of Germany. With the U.S. as a newly engaged Ally, western forces bring the war to the Axis front, but at extreme costs.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: The Industry of War
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to rebuild Germany's military strength after the destruction of almost all its weaponry in the First World War. To overcome his country's dire shortage of raw materials, he plans to steal them from other countries.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Bombing the Reich
programme.desc: Devastation touches the civilians of Germany. With the U.S. as a newly engaged Ally, western forces bring the war to the Axis front, but at extreme costs.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Overlord
programme.desc: By early 1944, Hitler faced a new threat. In the West, Allied preparations to invade northwest France were coming to a climax. It was an attack he had long been expecting. His problem was knowing when and where it would come.

programme.title: Hitler: The Victor
programme.desc: A look at Hitler's transformation from Fuhrer of the German people into the megalomaniac Nazi Messiah who triggers the global carnage of World War II.

programme.title: Hitler: The Actor
programme.desc: Investigates Hitler's breathtaking rise from election defeat in 1928 to Germany's Messiah in 1933. Experts analyze his speeches, dissect his PR gift and interrogate the mind of a man who ruthlessly executes his closest comrade.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Stealing Italy
programme.desc: The team is on the trail of two iconic treasures: $1.5 billion worth of gold looted from the Bank of Italy and missing art from the great museums of Florence.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: City of Loot
programme.desc: The team investigates the systematic looting of Paris during four years of Nazi occupation and tracks missing treasures to Berlin and Switzerland.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Blood Treasure
programme.desc: Conflicts between Nazi Germany and the Soviet Union cost millions of lives. The war also led to two of the most infamous and mysterious treasure thefts ever. The team searches for the Amber Room and the missing Berlin treasure hoard.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Top Secret World War II
programme.desc: We've all heard about the ultra covert units used in WWII, the unbreakable codes, top secret underground nerve centers, and super-human navy seals, but here is what history forgot about WWII's most classified operations.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Missing Masterpiece
programme.desc: The painting 'Portrait of a Young Man' by Raphael, is the most valuable piece of art stolen by the Nazis.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Fighting for Freedom
programme.desc: We've all heard the phrase 'go for broke,' remember the Fall of Saigon as Vietnam's bitter end, have listened to the legends spun around top-secret microfilm, and have seen the classic movie, 'the Dirty Dozen.' Here's what you haven't heard.

programme.title: Weaponology: Fire Weapons
programme.desc: Witness how fire has become a terrifying weapon of mass destruction, burning hotter, harder and longer - from the simple Molotov cocktail to the awesome destructive power of today's thermo baric bombs.

programme.title: Weaponology: Booby Traps
programme.desc: Dangerous and infinitely adaptable, traps are the hidden killers of the battlefield.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Khe Sanh: Marines Under Siege
programme.desc: Six thousand outnumbered marines fight for survival against a vast, highly trained Communist army in a bloody 77 day siege. It's a battle that will shape the course of the war in Vietnam.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Battle for the Pacific
programme.desc: See how America recovered from Pearl Harbor and, in one year, achieved supremacy in the Pacific over the Japanese empire. Featuring highlights of the defining battles that turned the tide in the Pacific theater and led to victory.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Closing the Ring
programme.desc: By late summer 1944, the Allied forces in north-west Europe were thrusting towards the German border. Paris and Antwerp were liberated, but then supply problems brought the advance to a halt. Meanwhile, Stalin had halted his main thrust towards Berlin.

programme.desc: The Konduses fight the rain and shattered window panes deep in the White Mountains. Mike and Teresa's team gets stuck on slippery scaffolding 19 feet in the air while Paige and Cody's build stalls thanks to a material ordering snafu near the deadline.

programme.title: Building Alaska: It's Gonna Be Plush
programme.desc: It's a race to the finish as Paige and Cody wrap up before dog racing season in Cantwell while Mike and Kathleen lose all their help deep in the White Mountains. Meanwhile, the Oldenkamps struggle with the challenges of working on a grain-bin-style cabin.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: The Cabin in the Quarry
programme.desc: The builders float down the Ohio River and land in Paducah, Kentucky, where they try to save a little cabin in a big quarry. Alex makes a chair, Johnny drives a dump truck, Sherman makes a quilt, and Mark helps build a barnwood table.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: The Graham Special
programme.desc: Graham Ferguson has grown from rookie to rockstar.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Barnwood Wedding
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders get ready for a farm wedding by building a barnwood dance floor, a timber-frame photo booth and an incredible handcrafted wedding arbor.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Log Kitchen Drop In
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders head to Cashiers, North Carolina, to build an antique log cabin in the middle of a huge, framed-out modern home.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Upstairs Battle
programme.desc: Rob and the ninjas tackle a rundown property in an up-and-coming neighborhood in Wellington, Florida. The stairwell and upstairs bedrooms and bathrooms are hurtin' for certain, so Rob and the ninjas give them the VIP treatment.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Salvaging Items in Roanoke, VA, Into Repurposed Goods
programme.desc: At the warehouse, Mike builds a coffee table from a panel door.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Bemis Cotton Mill
programme.desc: Mike, Robert and the rest of the team salvage the Bemis Cotton Mill in Jackson, TN. Key finds include fire doors, earthenware sinks, factory carts, and a gang sink. At the warehouse, Mike builds a bookshelf using the panels from a door.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Reed Creek Mill
programme.desc: The Dawgs salvage the Reed Creek Mill in Wytheville, VA. Key items found include conveyor belts and a flour hopper. Mike also builds a console for his nephew.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Drayton Mill
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs travel to the Drayton Mill in Spartanburg, SC. Key items salvaged include a large fan and valves. Mike builds a new desk for his office out of a salvaged airplane wing.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Virginia Tobacco Plant
programme.desc: Robert takes the team to tobacco country where they tackle a cigarette factory, without an elevator, on the hottest day of the year. With the Dawg Bowl opening just around the corner, Mike and Tay shift their focus to a lovable piece for the venue.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: American Viscose Plant
programme.desc: The Dawgs save a kiln from the American Viscose Plant in Roanoke, VA. Mike and Tay work together to build custom tables for a local optometrist office. Will Farmer also returns to appraise a map from 1853.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Fringer Cannery
programme.desc: Mike, Robert, and the crew salvage an old iron ore mine that was converted into a cannery in the 1930s. Main items include a curved I-beam, oversized pressure-cookers, and a canning carousel.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Noland Sign Company
programme.desc: The Black Dog Salvage team works in Roanoke, Virginia, at the Noland Sign Company. On a windy day, they salvage metal lettering, copper cupolas and vintage plumbing.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Former Dixie Furniture Plant
programme.desc: The team travel to a vacant furniture plant in Lexington, NC, where they work in near-darkness salvaging conveyor belts, fire doors, veneer molds, factory carts, and industrial lights.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Cosby Brothers Mill
programme.desc: Mike and Robert give Tay a history lesson with an old dentistry x-ray machine before the team loads up for a project in Grottoes, VA. They start at Cosby Brothers Mill where they hope to salvage some old mill parts.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Good Ol' Reno in Gulf Shores, Alabama
programme.desc: A couple searches for a beachfront vacation spot in Gulf Shores, AL. They find a house in their dream location but the dated home needs a brand-new look to fit their colorful style.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: North Carolina Renewal
programme.desc: After a recent medical scare, Nicole is ready to live life to the fullest in a home by the water in Moorehead City, NC.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Wowing In Wildwood
programme.desc: A couple that's relocating from the Washington, DC, area to Wildwood, New Jersey, finds the perfect beach house for their family of five. It needs serious renovating, and while they have a big budget, they also have a big wish list.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: A Coastal Cottage in Hampton, Virginia
programme.desc: A couple that dreams of raising their two sons along the shores of Hampton, Virginia, finds a waterfront property in need of serious updating.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Smilin' on Anna Maria Island
programme.desc: After years of vacationing in the area, a woman and her grandmother are ready to purchase a home of their own in the coastal community of Anna Maria Island, FL.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Decadent Dessert
programme.desc: Armed with a serious love of food and years of experience in the restaurant business, Casey Webb travels the country in search of America's most delicious dishes and ultimate eating challenges.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Best BBQ
programme.desc: Casey's quest for America's best bites has taken him from coast to coast, and it's about time we started celebrating the cream of the crop. Fire up the grill, because this time we’re inducting the Best BBQ in the history of Man V. Food.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Mac and Cheese and Monster Meat
programme.desc: Noah takes a bite out of the Great New York State Fair where The Defibrillator gets his heart pumping. Then he tries on two local favorites -- the piquant Buffalo chicken mac and cheese and the crispy clamwich.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Shepherd's Pie and Sunday Dinner Sundaes
programme.desc: Noah Cappe kicks things off at the Big E in West Springfield, Mass., where he 'meats up' with a deconstructed Turducken Sandwich and the award-winning country fried shepherd's pie.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Dumplings & Pumpkins
programme.desc: Noah's first stop is at the North Florida Fair in Tallahassee, where he feels the burn with dead heat tacos.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Bowls and Rolls
programme.desc: The Norfolk County Fair in Ontario, Canada, is a culinary carnival of good eats.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Dude, Where's My Carb?
programme.desc: Noah Cappe takes on the Porter County Fair in Indiana, where a pile of locally sourced pork is served three ways in a single dish.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Gourmets of the Galaxy
programme.desc: The Iowa State Fair welcomes Noah Cappe with a trio of meaty masterpieces, but it's the double Dutch almond funnel that has everyone jumping with joy.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Cheese Please!
programme.desc: Noah Cappe is back for seconds of his seven favourite melty, ooey-gooey carnival treats. From the savoury truffled grilled cheese at the St. Paul Winter Carnival.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Orange is the New Snack
programme.desc: Noah Cappe discovers brand new carnival eats in the orange groves of California at the Cloverdale Citrus Fair. The Bacon Churro Cheeseburger is a meaty mouthful sandwiched between two churros.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Kids' Menu
programme.desc: From macaroni and cheese to milkshakes to pizza, these are the greatest dishes found on- and inspired b- the kids' menu. Alex Guarnaschelli shares her comfort food lunch favourite from Ted's Bulletin in Washington, D.C.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Low and Slow
programme.desc: Patience is a virtue, and the greatest mouthwatering dishes can't be rushed. Wolfgang Puck admires APL Restaurant in Los Angeles for making a sandwich that's well worth the wait.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Borrowed Favourites
programme.desc: Sharing is caring, and the treats that family and friends love become personal favourites too! Robert Irvine takes his wife's advice and discovers the world's greatest omelet at Babystacks Cafe in Las Vegas, Nev.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: On the Waterfront
programme.desc: Head outside for the best of both worlds: breathtaking scenery with fresh air, clear skies and the most-incredible waterfront dining in the U.S. Anne Burrell adores the sights with a meaty pasta from Cecconi's Dumbo in Brooklyn, N.Y.

programme.title: Southern and Hungry: It's All About Auburn
programme.desc: Rutledge Wood and Damaris Philips visit Auburn, Alabama, known for its cuisine that uses classic Southern ingredients in inventive ways.

programme.title: Southern and Hungry: Bring It On, Birmingham!
programme.desc: Damaris Philips and Rutledge Wood are sold on Birmingham, Alabama's, Southern hospitality and amazing eats! At the charming 1950s hot dog shop Gus's Hot Dogs, the duo feasts on a spicy wiener packed with decidedly Southern flavors and spices.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: South of the Border
programme.desc: We head South of the Border for Bobby's Mexican themed brunch with his version of Huevos Rancheros with Chorizo and a spicy Tomato-Red Chile Sauce.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Slumber Party
programme.desc: When Bobby's daughter Sophie has a sleepover it can only mean one thing... dad's in the kitchen cooking up brunch for everyone! This fun and tasty menu starts with an apple pie oatmeal with bruleed crust that's sure to wake up your taste buds.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Bloody Bite Size Brunch
programme.desc: Bobby's small-plates-inspired menu will make sure his each of his guests gets a taste of something delicious. Bobby starts with crispy bacon and hash brown quesadillas with fried quail eggs.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Brunch That Does a Body Good
programme.desc: As a chef constantly surrounded by food, it's important for Bobby to keep healthy options in mind... even when it comes to brunch! Bobby's fitness-minded menu is filled with some of his favourite ingredients.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Hot and Spicy
programme.desc: Michael Symon digs into a spicy burger that uses four different types of peppers to fire up even the most adventurous eaters in Hell's Kitchen, New York City, before heading to Nashville, where he finds Southern comforts infused with Latin flavors.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Smoked and Stacked
programme.desc: Duff Goldman makes a guest appearance at Michael Symon's favorite Baton Rouge, La. smokehouse that boasts a pork belly hoagie so outrageous it has to be shared. Next up in St. Louis, a big fat Greek burger ignites Michael's cultural soul, and in Austin.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Super Smoked and Savory
programme.desc: In Queens, New York, Michael Symon dives into the juiciest, meatiest, triple-stacked burger with beef, lamb and turkey. Some of the most authentic Mexican lamb barbacoa this side of the border is found in Houston, Texas.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Giant Meat and Habanero Heat
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in Boston with a burger that originated as a late night, off-menu secret and accidentally became the talk of the town. Then, in Seattle, a beer hall serves a mammoth, pretzel-breaded, deep-fried pork shank.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Beauty and the Beef
programme.desc: It's love at first bite as Noah Cappe munches on some Texas-sized treats at Rodeo Austin. With a tagline of "where Western meets weird," the Rodeo is the place to find one-of-a-kind carnival eats like the Kobe beef Rodeo Austin burger.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Fight Club Sandwich
programme.desc: Noah Cappe meets his match with some knock-out fruity feasts at the Florida Strawberry Festival in Plant City. He starts the day with the strawberry French toast burger and slurps the way better strawberry shake.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Hot Dog Time Machine
programme.desc: Noah Cappe takes a trip to the Coastal Carolina Fair near Charleston, S.C., where he samples a local legend, Jack's Cosmic Dog. Trolling the fairgrounds, Noah catches the catfish sundae and takes a bite of fall flavors with the pumpkin cheesecake pop.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Ham-let
programme.desc: Noah heads to San Diego and hams it up at the Balboa Park December Nights festival. The day starts off right with a breakfast Belgian waffle called the "Ham I Am."

programme.title: Carnival Eats: A-Frying In Winter
programme.desc: Noah Cappe chills out with some cool Twin City treats at the Saint Paul Winter Carnival. Despite sub-zero temperatures, he gets into the spirit with local specialties like the Nordic Waffle Pizza and the super-indulgent Biergarten Cupcake.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Smokey and the Slamwich
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to the Arkansas State Fair for the hometown hero, the Arkansas Slamwich, the Stuffed Thanksgiving Taco and more.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Burlington, VT
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to the small town of Burlington, Vermont, for some mammoth eats, including a beer-infused bagel feast and a 3.5-pound breakfast sandwich challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Louisville, Ky
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Louisville, Kentucky, for some epic eats, including a booze-infused Southern staple and a one-of-a-kind spicy popcorn and frozen hot chocolate challenge in nearby Santa Claus, Indiana.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Omaha, Nebraska
programme.desc: Casey Webb heads to Omaha to satisfy his hunger in the heartland. He chows down on a historic Reuben sandwich, a soul food feast featuring fried chicken from a 100-year-old recipe.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Green Bay
programme.desc: Adam is at the NFL's opening game in Green Bay to showcase the city's best eats.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Bible: Paul the Apostle
programme.desc: Saint Paul's transformation from Christianity's bitterest foe to its strongest advocate.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: What a Gem/ Family Spirit
programme.desc: When Alvin sees a sparkling diamond buried in his neighbor's rose garden, he's sure she's responsible for the recent diamond heist. Alvin tries to get out of the annual family day picnic with Dave to go to the big soccer game.

programme.title: Movie: Monsters, Inc.

Amphibia: A Night at the Inn/ Wally and Anne
programme.desc: The Plantars stay at an inn for a night, but Polly discovers the caretakers aren’t what they seem. Everyone calls Anne crazy when she claims to have seen the Moss Man.

programme.title: Amphibia: Scavenger Hunt/ The Plantars Check In
programme.desc: Anne, Sprig and Marcy receive a mysterious message from the king of Newtopia that sends them on a puzzle-solving mission. Anne finally meets with King Andrias and tries to enlist his help in getting back home.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Golf War
programme.desc: After being belittled by Pacifica one too many times, Mabel challenges her to a miniature golf-off which gets a tad out of control when some local residents offer their help.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boss Mabel
programme.desc: When Mabel questions the way Sam runs the Shack, he challenges her to a bet: whoever can make the most money in three days wins the chance to run the Shack however they wish for the rest of the summer.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Garage Tales/ Animal Farm
programme.desc: After finding a box of mementos, Gramma tells the kids the story of her greatest adventure. While the Greens are away, the animals compete to see who will rule the farm.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Tilly Tour/ Dinner Party
programme.desc: Tilly takes Gramma out to be a tourist for a day. Cricket and Remy arrange a dinner party for everyone to get to know each other.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Big Bugball Game/ Combat Camp
programme.desc: Anne must learn the value of teamwork to win the town’s annual Bugball game.

programme.title: Amphibia: Handy Anne/ Fort in the Road
programme.desc: Worried that something bad could happen while they are in Newtopia, Anne decides to disaster-proof the farm. Later, Sprig longs for exotic road trip adventures, but Hop Pop's strict road rules threaten to spoil all of his fun plans.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Legacies
programme.desc: Chief Cruz and the police get the upper hand in their battle with both villains and Big Hero 6 when they begin using Buddy Guardians, powerful new robots produced by Krei Tech.

programme.title: Amphibia: Toad Tax/ Prison Break
programme.desc: Anne befriends toad soldiers to gain respect in Wartwood, but must choose between her new respect and her frog family. Far from Wartwood, Anne’s friend Sasha is captured by toads.

programme.title: Amphibia: Family Fishing Trip/ Bizarre Bazaar
programme.desc: Sprig wants to spend time with Hop Pop on their family fishing trip, but Hop Pop's friend Sylvia gets in the way. Anne's music box goes missing at the mysterious and exclusive Bizarre Bazaar.

programme.title: Amphibia: Children of the Spore/ Anne of the Year
programme.desc: A scary mushroom adventure! Anne wins the prestigious “Frog of the Year” award and gets to plan her own party, but the frogs of Wartwood may not be ready for a human-style bash.

programme.title: Amphibia: Reunion
programme.desc: During a banquet hosted by the toads, Anne is reunited with a friend from home.

programme.title: Amphibia: Quarreler's Pass/ Toadcatcher
programme.desc: Hop Pop drops Sprig and Polly off at an obstacle-filled mountain trail designed to help them get along. Sasha and Grime must reconcile their differences to escape Newtopia's most skilled warrior, General Yunnan.

programme.title: Amphibia: Marcy at the Gates
programme.desc: The family must defeat an entire ant army before they enter Newtopia.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Scary-oke
programme.desc: Kyle wants to be smart like his younger sister. When The Cortex overhears this, he decides to exploit Kyle's dream. Then, Motho Jr. doesn't want to wreak havoc like the stereotypical movie monster his dad is, he just wants to dance.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Into the Bunker
programme.desc: Dipper's secret journal pages lead him and the gang to the author's hidden bunker where they find themselves face-to-face with a mysterious figure from Gravity Falls' lore.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket's Kapowie! / Car Trouble
programme.desc: Cricket earns a role in Big Coffee’s new TV commercial but loses his confidence. Bill trades his pickup in for a cutting-edge electric car, but gets more than he bargained for.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Gargoyle Gals/ Supermarket Scandal
programme.desc: To impress her new friend, Tilly claims she saw stone gargoyles come to life.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Ballad of Hopediah Plantar/ Anne Hunter
programme.desc: Hop Pop's efforts to be hailed as a hero amongst some small-town folks backfires when he stands up to the wrong family. Then, when the family is in danger, Anne must put her self-consciousness aside in order to learn the true way of the hunter.

programme.title: Amphibia: Dating Season / Anne vs. Wild
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boyz Crazy
programme.desc: Mabel joins a secret knitting club and is pressured by her new friends to gossip, but when she tells them that Dipper likes Wendy, she inadvertently puts Dipper's life in danger.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Headhunters
programme.desc: When someone tampers with Mabel's life-size wax statue, she and Dipper set out to find the culprit. Meanwhile, Grunkle Stan mourns over the loss of his wax doppelganger.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Hand That Rocks the Mabel
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel discover their seemingly cherubic new neighbour, Lil' Gideon, happens to be the town's adored psychic. But when Dipper convinces Mabel to go on a date with Gideon to question his authenticity, she soon learns that his cuteness can fade.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Love God
programme.desc: Mabel takes matchmaking too far when she steals a love potion from a real Love God.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Time Traveler's Pig
programme.desc: When Dipper wishes he could go back in time and undo a mistake he made, he discovers there is a time machine that can help him do just that. Meanwhile, it's love at first sight for Mabel when she wins a pet pig at the fair.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Golf War
programme.desc: After being belittled by Pacifica one too many times, Mabel challenges her to a miniature golf-off which gets a tad out of control when some local residents offer their help.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Deep End
programme.desc: When Mabel befriends a cute Merman trapped in the deep end of the public pool, she's determined to return him to his family in the ocean, even though that means her whirlwind romance will come to an end.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Land Before Swine
programme.desc: When a prehistoric beast snatches Mabel’s beloved pig Waddles, the Pines family must journey to a land trapped in time to rescue him.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boss Mabel
programme.desc: When Mabel questions the way Sam runs the Shack, he challenges her to a bet: whoever can make the most money in three days wins the chance to run the Shack however they wish for the rest of the summer.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Stanchurian Candidate
programme.desc: When Grunkle Stan decides to run for mayor, Dipper and Mabel have their work cut out for them trying to turn their gaffe-prone uncle into the perfect candidate.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Carpet Diem
programme.desc: Mabel finds a way to swap minds with Dipper and the townsfolk, so she uses her new found ability to make a difference in people's lives.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Roadside Attraction
programme.desc: Grunkle Stan takes the kids with him on a road-trip to sabotage all the other tourist traps in Oregon.

programme.desc: A group of oil workers become stranded in the Mongolian desert after their plane crashes. They must deal with destructive natural elements, vicious smugglers and each other, all while rebuilding their plane. The plane is their only chance at survival.

programme.title: Movie: Yesterday
programme.desc: A man realizes he is the last person on Earth who remembers the Beatles.

programme.title: Movie: Cast Away
programme.desc: The lone survivor of a plane crash adapts to life on a remote island. An escape plan proves successful, but after years away from his life he discovers that much has changed.

programme.title: Our Cartoon President: Party Unity
programme.desc: Feeling overshadowed by the idolized Cartoon Bernie Sanders and Cartoon Barack Obama, Cartoon Joe Biden sets out to earn his place as the face of the Democratic Party. Meanwhile, Cartoon Don Jr. and Cartoon Eric Trump try to develop a miracle cure.

programme.title: The Circus: Inside the Craziest Political Campaign on Earth: Force Majeure
programme.desc: The Circus investigates the politicization of COVID-19. While Trump continues to prioritize the economy, Biden has upheld health experts, begging the question: how will the discourse between Red and Blue affect the 2020 election in swing states?

programme.title: Movie: On the Basis of Sex
programme.desc: A young Ruth Bader Ginsburg challenges the gender norms of the era as she fights to achieve equal rights for all women. With an array of powerful forces opposing her, she finds strength in her loving family, especially her supportive husband.

programme.title: The Circus: Inside the Craziest Political Campaign on Earth: Full Court Press

programme.desc: When a domesticated parrot in Minnesota meets the bird of his dreams, they take off to Rio de Janeiro.

programme.title: Movie: Rio 2

programme.title: Movie: Matilda

programme.title: Movie: Black Panther
programme.desc: After his father's death, T'Challa becomes both the ruler of the secretive kingdom of Wakanda and the superhero Black Panther. With outside threats looming, the young king teams up with a CIA agent to both save his kingdom and prevent a war.

programme.title: Bones: Judas on a Pole

programme.title: Bones: The Man in the Cell

programme.title: Charmed: Styx Feet Under
programme.desc: Paige casts a spell that stops all deaths; Phoebe faces her feelings for Lesley.

programme.title: Supernatural: Folsom Prison Blues

programme.desc: While hunting a Djinn, a genie, Dean is attacked and transported to a world where his mother is alive. Sam is in law school and is engaged to Jessica. Dean must decide whether he wants to stay in this new life or return to the hunt.

programme.title: Supernatural: All Hell Breaks Loose
programme.desc: Sam is abducted by the Yellow-Eyed Demon and finds himself in a ghost town with other children who have special abilities. Dean enlists Bobby to help find Sam.

programme.title: Supernatural: All Hell Breaks Loose
