programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Artist
programme.desc: Dorothy, Blanche and Rose all agree to pose for the Hungarian sculptor Laszlo.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Blanche's Little Girl
programme.desc: Blanche is thrilled by a visit from her daughter, Rebecca, an ex-model who has now gained quite a bit of weight. Also visiting with Rebecca is her oafish beau who constantly puts down her weight.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Dorothy's New Friend
programme.desc: Dorothy befriends a novelist, Barbara Thorndyke, and she quickly infringes on Dorothy's relationship with Blanche and Rose, who think Barbara is nothing but a stuck up snob.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Grab That Dough
programme.desc: The girls fly to Los Angeles to appear on their favourite game show.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: My Brother My Father
programme.desc: Sophia's brother, Angelo, a priest, is coming to Miami for a visit and he doesn't know Dorothy and Stan are divorced. So in order to spare his feelings, Sophia convinces Dorothy and Stan to pretend to be married.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Accurate Conception
programme.desc: Blanche's daughter, Rebecca, has some wonderful news. She's going to become a mother through artificial insemination. However, Blanche is less than thrilled and totally against the entire idea.

programme.title: Frasier: Sleeping With the Enemy
programme.desc: Frasier is elected spokesperson for the support staff to convince Kate Costas to give them their five percent raise. However, their antagonism towards each other soon develops into animal-like lust.

programme.title: Frasier: The Adventures of Bad Boy and Dirty Girl
programme.desc: Kate and Frasier have difficulty resisting temptation, but when they finally give in to their emotions, it is accidentally broadcast across Seattle and everyone wants to know the identity of 'Dirty Girl.'

programme.title: Frasier: The Last Time I Saw Maris
programme.desc: Maris goes missing for days and when she eventually returns, she asks Niles for a divorce.

programme.title: Frasier: Frasier the Grinch
programme.desc: When the wrong Christmas gifts arrive for Frederick, Frasier is forced to go to the mall.

programme.title: Frasier: It's Hard to Say Goodbye If You Won't Leave
programme.desc: Frasier realizes the depth of his feelings for Kate, only to find out that she's moving the next day.

programme.title: Frasier: The Friend
programme.desc: Frasier's on-air appeal for friendship backfires when a boring man calls in. Frasier decides to meet Bob, but has trouble ending the friendship with his new wheelchair-bound friend when their tastes clearly conflict.

programme.title: Frasier: Come Lie With Me
programme.desc: Frasier lays down the law after finding out Joe spent the night in Daphne's room. Her reaction leaves the men paralyzed at the thought that Daphne may move out.

programme.title: Frasier: Moon Dance
programme.desc: After receiving ballroom dancing lessons from her, Niles invites Daphne to the ball at the country club as his last-minute date.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Little Ricky Gets a Dog
programme.desc: The Ricardo's apartment begins to resemble a pet shop when Little Ricky gets a dog.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Lucy Wants to Move to the Country
programme.desc: Lucy thinks it would be nice to move to the country and places a deposit on a large house.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Lucy Hates to Leave
programme.desc: Lucy changes her mind about moving to the country once it's too late.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Lucy Misses the Mertzes
programme.desc: The Ricardos get settled in their country home after years in a New York City apartment.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Sick and Tired
programme.desc: Dorothy is suffering from a mysterious fatigue syndrome that her doctors cannot identify.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Sick and Tired
programme.desc: Dorothy finds a specialist, a Chinese virologist, who may have the key to her illness.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Rose Fights Back
programme.desc: When the company that Rose's husband worked for, cuts off their pension plan, Rose must face the fact that she's going to get a new job, one that pays more.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Love Under the Big Top
programme.desc: Dorothy's in a serious relationship with a lawyer and jumps to the conclusion that he's on the verge of proposing. His annoucement is shocking as he's leaving law to become a circus clown. Rose and Blanch put together a protest to save some dolphins.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Dancing in the Dark
programme.desc: Rose has been dating, Miles Webber, a college professor, but the only thing they seem to have in common is the dance floor.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Not Another Monday
programme.desc: Sophia's friend has come up with an idea that will change her life. She wants to commit suicide and she wants Sophia there to hold her hand.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Guests include actress Jessy Schram from 'Country at Heart' and Cheryl Burke from 'Dancing With The Stars.'

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Meet Rachael Leigh Cook from 'Love, Guaranteed,' Ryan McPartlin from 'LA's Finest,' and cook with Chef Marcela Valladolid.

programme.title: Movie: Frozen in Love
programme.desc: A bookstore owner and a professional hockey player team up to make over each other. They soon realize that opposites attract and find themselves falling in love.

programme.title: Movie: June in January
programme.desc: Every January, June goes through post-holiday blues and Alex surprises her.

programme.title: South Park: Conjoined Fetus Lady
programme.desc: Kyle visits the dreaded school nurse, who suffers from Conjoined Twin Myslexia Disease. His reaction prompts the entire town to rally behind the nurse, singling her out to 'honour' her. Meanwhile, Pip leads the school dodgeball team to the championships.

programme.title: South Park: The Return of the Fellowship of the Ring to the Two Towers
programme.desc: The boys embark upon a mythical quest as they set out to return their copy of the 'The Lord of the Rings' movie to the Two Towers video store. Unknown to them, they are really carrying the most degraded porno ever made.

programme.title: South Park: ManBearPig
programme.desc: The boys are trapped in a cave and Cartman finds a treasure. Meanwhile, Al Gore shows up in town to warn the citizens about the threat of ManBearPig.

programme.title: South Park: The Last of the Meheecans
programme.desc: Cartman joins the U.S. Border Patrol.

programme.title: South Park: Freak Strike
programme.desc: When the boys learn that talk shows offer prizes to people who are grossly disfigured they can't sign Butters up fast enough.

programme.title: South Park: Marjorine
programme.desc: The boys are on a secret mission to find out exactly what happens behind closed doors when the fourth grade girls have a sleepover. The plan is simple: fake Butters' death, resurrect him as a girl, and infiltrate this age-old feminine tradition.

programme.title: South Park: Butters' Bottom Bitch
programme.desc: Butters is determined to get his first kiss so his friends won't make fun of him anymore. Soon he's running his own ring of girls who will kiss for money and runs into trouble with some pimps.

programme.title: South Park: Raisins
programme.desc: After Wendy breaks up with Stan the boys take him to 'Raisins,' a local restaurant known for its great chicken wings and hot girls.

programme.title: South Park: Professor Chaos
programme.desc: When the boys fire Butters as their new friend, devastation over his rejection unleashes his dark side and the super villain Professor Chaos is born.

programme.title: South Park: Simpsons Already Did It
programme.desc: Professor Chaos is frustrated when he realizes all of his diabolical plans to wreak havoc on South Park have already been done by 'The Simpsons.' Meanwhile, Cartman and the boys try to retrieve their sea-men from Ms. Choksondik's stomach.

programme.title: South Park: Butters' Very Own Episode
programme.desc: Alone and lost, Butters determinedly makes his way through porn theatres and gay bath houses in an effort to get his dad back home in time to eat at Bennigan's for his parents' anniversary.

programme.title: South Park: AWESOM-O
programme.desc: Cartman plans to learn all of Butters' innermost secrets and then use them against him, by pretending to be Butters' new best friend, a robot named AWESOM-O.

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: September 28, 2020
programme.desc: News reports, trends, pop culture, sports and politics with an alternative point of view.

programme.title: South Park: Two Days Before the Day After Tomorrow
programme.desc: After a global warming state of emergency is declared in South Park, the world's largest beaver dam breaks and floods the town of Beaverton. The people of South Park must figure out who they can blame before anyone can be saved in the adjacent town.

programme.title: South Park: Casa Bonita
programme.desc: Kyle chooses Stan, Kenny and Butters to celebrate his birthday at Casa Bonita. When Cartman finds out he's not invited, he arranges for Butters to conveniently go 'missing.'

programme.title: South Park: Free Hat
programme.desc: When the boys find out that their favourite movies are being enhanced, re-released and ruined in the process, they form a club to 'Save Films from their Directors.'

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: September 28, 2020
programme.desc: News reports, trends, pop culture, sports and politics with an alternative point of view.

programme.title: South Park: The Death of Eric Cartman
programme.desc: Cartman is sure he's dead and Butters is sure that Eric Cartman's ghost is haunting him. Together they attempt to make amends to all the people Cartman has wronged over the years.

programme.title: South Park: Crippled Summer
programme.desc: Jimmy and Timmy head off to summer camp with all their handi-capable friends. When one of the camp counsellors, Towelie, falls off the wagon, the boys stage an intervention.

programme.title: South Park: The Return of Chef
programme.desc: Stan, Kyle, Kenny and Cartman are thrilled to have their old friend back when the town is jolted by Chef's sudden reappearance. The boys soon notice that Chef is acting different and his strange behaviour begins to get him in serious trouble.

programme.title: South Park: Cartman Sucks
programme.desc: Cartman invites Butters over for the night and plans to do disgusting things to him in his sleep. However, when he photographs Butters' penis in his mouth, there are drastic consequences for both boys.

programme.title: South Park: Obama Wins!
programme.desc: There's something in Cartman's bedroom that may change the Presidential election outcome.

programme.title: South Park: Turd Burglars
programme.desc: Kyle’s mom has a fecal transplant and the boys are on a quest for the best microbiome.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life

programme.title: The Closer: To Protect and Serve
programme.desc: A murder hits close to home when a dead body is discovered in Detective Lt. Provenza's garage. When Provenza and Flynn want to make it to a Dodgers game on time, the body disappears and the Homicide Division tries to cover its negligence.

programme.title: The Closer: Out of Focus
programme.desc: When a paparazzi photographer appears to have killed himself by jumping out of a hotel window, Deputy Chief Brenda Johnson is called in to investigate. Fritz is getting calls from a female colleague, which makes Brenda jealous.

programme.title: The Closer: Head Over Heels
programme.desc: Brenda starts an investigation when severed body parts are found in the dumpster. The victim is a popular porn star who also happens to have HIV+. Many of the co-stars may have also been exposed to HIV.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: We Don't Need Another Hero
programme.desc: Jane is honoured as a hero at a public event but the celebration is short-lived when disaster strikes. The ensuing case reunites Jane with an old high school flame who may be the person she needs to help her heal emotionally.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Living Proof
programme.desc: Jane and Maura's relaxing day at an outdoor spa is anything but when they discover the murder of a pregnant woman serving as a surrogate mother. Soon the hunt is on the find the baby's biological parents.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Sailor Man
programme.desc: Shortly after sailors invade the streets of Boston for Fleet Week a young girl is found dead. Frost's father, a Navy Admiral, comes to town, causing tension with his son. Maura goes on a date with Angela's mechanic.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Brown Eyed Girl
programme.desc: When the daughter of a police officer is kidnapped, Jane and the team race to find her, fearing the abduction is connected to another case where a young girl turned up dead only hours earlier.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Don't Hate the Player
programme.desc: Jane and Maura investigate after the coach of the Boston Pilgrims baseball team is found dead in the locker room. The death comes as a star player and the team owners battle for control of the team.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Rebel Without a Pause
programme.desc: A Revolutionary War re-enactment becomes the scene of a real killing when a soldier turns up dead. Maura's extensive knowledge of American history becomes important as she and Jane try to solve the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Family Ties
programme.desc: An esteemed couple is brutally attacked in their home, leaving one dead and the other gravely injured. The survivor identifies the killer but recants her admission leaving investigators probing for answers. A DNA hit captures the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trouble Brewing
programme.desc: A high-priced call girl is murdered on the outskirts of Columbia, SC, and find that a six-pack of beer may be their only link to the person responsible.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Impression
programme.desc: For sixteen years, a woman's death was considered an accident. Until someone called the authorities suggesting it was murder-- and turned up dead themselves.

programme.title: Forensic Files: If I Were You
programme.desc: A retired school teacher vanishes, but even though he was missing his bills are paid on time and he continues to correspond with his family.

programme.title: Forensic Files: As the Tide Turns
programme.desc: A woman is found dead. A man's version of events was at variance with the evidence, so investigators turned to forensic science, hoping to determine if this was a botched robbery, or cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Tight Leash
programme.desc: Law enforcement officials turn to forensic scientists when they experience difficulty in their attempts to figure out how a stalker was able to steal his victim's personal photographs and obtain the code to her home security system.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: James Jordan: Vanished
programme.desc: When in 1993, James Raymond Jordan Sr. goes missing and his luxury car is found stripped and abandoned in North Carolina, clues point to a tragic crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Home Evasion
programme.desc: A husband finds his wife shot outside of their home and she mutters the name of her apparent assailant just before her death. It takes fingerprint comparison, handwriting analysis, ballistics, and DNA testing for the true killer to be revealed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Window Watcher
programme.desc: Evidence at the scene supported a woman's seemingly farfetched story that a man wearing only underwear and gloves broke into the house, stabbed her boyfriend to death, and raped and terrorized her for hours afterwards.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Leg to Stand On
programme.desc: Police investigate when a severed leg is found in the garbage. When they realize they can't use conventional techniques to catch the killer, police must use scientific techniques like DNA testing and toxicology reports to find him.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Catch 22
programme.desc: When a woman is shot to death in her driveway, police suspect a younger co-worker whose advances she spurned of killing her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Purebread Murder
programme.desc: A young mother is murdered after years of domestic abuse. There are clues at the scene: bloody footprints and DNA from the victim's rape kit. But the evidence which will conclusively tie the killer to the crime is on a freshly baked hamburger bun.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hear No Evil
programme.desc: Threatening emails, a missing person and an abandoned truck lead police to a home where they believe a murder was committed. The evidence is overwhelming and investigators are sure they have the killer. What they don't have is the body of the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sharper Image

programme.title: Forensic Files: Insulated Evidence
programme.desc: A young college student is found strangled and badly burned. Investigators get a break when a trace evidence expert uncovers the murder weapon in the spool of a vacuum.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Hearted
programme.desc: After a man dies with no proof of foul play, investigators learn that another man died the exact same way six years earlier. The men had one thing in common: at the time of their deaths, they were married to the same woman.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wheel of Misfortune

programme.title: Beyond the Tank
programme.desc: Robert Herjavec is pleased that Donnie Sandusky and Peter Hamborg's skateboard business, Hamboards, enjoyed a nice sales bump after their season 5 appearance. But Robert finds out they're having a problem keeping their business afloat.

programme.title: Dateline NBC: The Disappearance of Sandi Johnson
programme.desc: Sandi Johnson vanished without a word, leaving family frantic as she always put her kids first. Police quickly uncover dark secrets in her marriage and several men in her life.

programme.title: Dateline NBC: Twelve Minutes on Elm Street
programme.desc: Two unarmed teenagers, Nick Brady and Haile Kifer, were shot dead by 64-year-old Byron Smith after breaking into his home on Thanksgiving Day. When Smith was charged with their murder, the small Minnesota town of Little Falls would soon become divided.

programme.title: Street Signs
programme.desc: A one hour view into Europe's equity session, providing price discovery, the street's view, instant analysis and a link to the business stories trending online and on social, breaking down key economic data in Europe.

programme.title: Worldwide Exchange
programme.desc: This worldwide, daily business program is anchored from New York, London and Singapore.

programme.title: Squawk Box
programme.desc: The business day with live reports from investment banks and the New York Stock Exchange.

programme.title: Squawk on the Street
programme.desc: The business day live reports from a new set overlooking the floor of the New York Stock Exchange.

programme.title: Squawk Alley
programme.desc: Topics related to the intersection of Wall Street and technology are discussed.

programme.title: Fast Money Halftime Report
programme.desc: The most up-to-date trading news, broadcasted straight from the NASDAQ studio.

programme.title: The Exchange
programme.desc: Kelly Evans provides helpful information to viewers making daily investment decisions.

programme.title: Power Lunch
programme.desc: An up-close look at the companies, people and trends impacting American businesses.

programme.title: Closing Bell
programme.desc: Maria Bartiromo guides viewers through the last 60 minutes of the trading day.

programme.title: The Loud House: Along Came a Sister/ Chore and Peace
programme.desc: Lincoln causes trouble when he loses the class tarantula during his turn taking care of it. Lincoln declares a strike until he can convince someone to switch chores with him.

programme.title: The Loud House: The Boss Maybe/ Family Bonding
programme.desc: Leni struggles to be the family babysitter. And, Lincoln and Clyde investigate new neighbours.

programme.title: The Loud House: The Butterfly Effect/ The Green House
programme.desc: After spilling an experiment of Lisa's, Lincoln sets off a chain reaction that unravels the household.

programme.title: The Loud House: The Crying Dame/ Anti Social
programme.desc: To get Lily to stop crying, the kids give her an old singing toy from the attic, but it quickly drives them crazy. Dad declares war on the kids' devices so they decide to show Dad how great electronics and the internet are.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Mexican Makeover/ Uptown Funk
programme.desc: When Mama Lupe comes to visit, Abuela tries to get her family at the top of their cultural game. Guest starring Angelica Aragon as Mama Lupe. Adelaide and Carl have an adventure on Mr. Chang's route.

programme.title: The Loud House: Change of Heart/ Health Kicked
programme.desc: Clyde, desperate to learn how to act normal around Lori, enlists Leni's help. Worried that Mom and Dad are hurting their health from not being active, the kids encourage them to exercise.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: New Digs/ Krabs a la Mode
programme.desc: SpongeBob moves into the Krusty Krab and turns it into an ice skating rink.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Enemy-in-Law/ Mermaid Man and Barnacle Boy VI
programme.desc: Krabs is horrified when he learns that the secret paramour dating his mother is Plankton.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Chandler Takes a Bath
programme.desc: Poor Joey is driving himself crazy with guilt over his secret feelings for Rachel.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Secret Closet
programme.desc: Joey dreams about being with Rachel and betraying Ross; Chandler finds a secret closet.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Joey Tells Rachel
programme.desc: A guilt-ridden Joey finally fesses up to a speechless Ross about his feelings for Rachel.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Tea Leaves
programme.desc: Rachel hopes to restore her fallen relationship with Joey by conjuring up a big lie.

programme.title: Friends: The One in Massapequa
programme.desc: Monica regrets volunteering to give a toast at her parents' 35th wedding anniversary.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Joey's Interview
programme.desc: Joey is thrilled when his name is used as a clue in Soap Opera Digest's crossword puzzle.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Baby Shower
programme.desc: Rachel panics during her baby shower when she realizes she is unprepared for motherhood.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Cooking Class
programme.desc: Stung by a critical review of the food in her restaurant, Monica takes a cooking class.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Rachel Is Late
programme.desc: When Rachel's delivery date passes, her ensuing pain makes her increasingly crotchety.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Rachel Has a Baby
programme.desc: Rachel's long-awaited baby nears delivery while an anxious Ross hovers nervously in the background. Monica and Chandler decide that they are ready to become parents themselves.

programme.title: Mom: Pork Loin and a Beat-up Monte Carlo
programme.desc: Christy competes with her classmates for a prestigious internship, and Bonnie babysits Tammy following her oral surgery.

programme.title: Mom: Flamingos and a Dance-Based Exercise Class
programme.desc: Bonnie and the ladies help Tammy prepare for her first date since getting out of prison. Also, in order to take the edge off, Christy revisits one of her old vices.

programme.title: Mom: Hacky Sack and a Beautiful Experience
programme.desc: Christy’s smoking causes problems when the ladies take a road trip. Also, Bonnie offers Adam unsolicited business advice.

programme.title: Mom: Big Floor Pillows and a Ball of Fire
programme.desc: Christy and Bonnie are suspicious when Adam’s best friend, Mitch, returns, insisting he’s a changed man.

programme.title: Full House: Back to School Blues
programme.desc: D.J. has a rough day at Junior High when she finds all the kids more grown-up than her.

programme.title: Full House: Breaking Up Is Hard to Do (in 22 Minutes)
programme.desc: Jesse and Rebecca have a fight; Michelle learns to skate; the tooth fairy visits.

programme.title: Full House: Nerd for a Day
programme.desc: Stephanie learns a lesson about teasing when she has to apologize for calling a boy names.

programme.title: Full House: Granny Tanner
programme.desc: Danny's mom is made to feel so welcome, that she decides to move in on a permanent basis.

programme.title: Full House: Star Search
programme.desc: Appearing on Star Search is Joey's last chance to become famous before his deadline.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Krusty Dogs / The Wreck of Mauna Loa

programme.title: Nickelodeon's Unfiltered: Cactus Pop Tarts!
programme.desc: Hope you like your pop tarts with spikes! Host Jay Pharoah introduces two mystery celebs hiding behind 3D animated filters. Darci Lynne Farmer, Gabrielle Nevaeh Green and Young Dylan ask questions and gather clues to unveil our special guests!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mustard O' Mine/ Shopping List
programme.desc: When The Krusty Krab runs out of mustard, Mr. Krabs sends SpongeBob, Patrick and Squidward to dig up some more. SpongeBob and Sandy have to collect Krabby Patty ingredients, but Plankton is following their every step.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Bear-ly Save Danny/ Pups Save the Mayor's Tulips
programme.desc: Danny X is stuck in a tree over a deep canyon and is pursued by hungry bears.

programme.title: Peppa Pig: Peppa Goes to Paris/ Grandpa Pig's Pond/ Once Upon a Time/ Super Potato/ Playgroup Star
programme.desc: Peppa and family go on a trip to Paris to meet Delphine Donkey and her family. The Donkey family take Peppa and family to the top of the Eiffel Tower, forcing Daddy Pig to face his fear of heights.

programme.title: Team Umizoomi: Stompasaurus
programme.desc: The Team's friend Wyatt is getting a new Stompasaurus toy delivered! But when the delivery truck drives down a bumpy road, the toy's pieces go flying! Team Umizoomi sets out to retrieve the pieces and return them to Wyatt.

programme.title: Team Umizoomi: Gloopy Fly Home
programme.desc: Team Umizoomi finds a little alien named Gloopy who crash-landed in Umi City. Gloopy wants to go home, but his spaceship is missing the star crystals that make it fly. The Team helps Gloopy find the missing crystals.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies: The Good, the Sad, and the Grumpy!
programme.desc: When Mr. Grumpfish turns up in Happy Junction, he makes everyone in town really grumpy.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies: A Tooth on the Looth
programme.desc: Deema has a loose tooth, and when it falls out, she's going to get a visit from the Tooth Fairy.

programme.title: Blue's Clues & You: Bluestock
programme.desc: We play Blue's Clues to figure out what song Blue wants to sing in the Bluestock show. Blue & Josh are excited to hear all of our musical friends sing.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines: Blaze and the Magic Genie

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Mighty Pups Charged Up: Pups vs. Three Super Baddies
programme.desc: The three super baddies take the Mighty Pups' meteor. They must get it back and Charge Up to stop them before the team of baddies destroys Adventure Bay.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Dino Rescue: Pups Save a Pterodactyl/ Pups and the Big Rumble

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Culture Shock/ F.U.N.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Shanghaid/ Gary Takes a Bath

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Play's the Thing/ Rodeo Daze

programme.title: Storage Wars: A Metamorphic Layer of True Romanticism
programme.desc: Ivy takes it to the house in nearby Lancaster, while Dave takes advantage of being so close to Ivy. Meanwhile, Justin pushes all of Rene's buttons, and comes out ahead.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Kumba-YUUUP!
programme.desc: The ladies from Vegas meet Dave, who promptly takes their locker away, leaving them only scraps; Kenny uses Mary as a Dave shield, and the two find their way to a decent unit of their own.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Vegas Shrugged
programme.desc: In Placentia, the Ladies from Vegas try out their own bidding style. Brandi and Jarrod try to phone it in, while Kenny and his brother show everyone that family comes second.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Assassin's Greed
programme.desc: Rene steals the units in Rancho Palos Verdes. Mary’s locker reveals a sticky past, while Justin shows that he can turn a small investment into a big return.

programme.title: Storage Wars: A Fistful of Dollar
programme.desc: Emily is faced with an all-male day in Paramount. Justin seeks Ivy's guidance with his vintage Cadillac parts, while Kenny immediately regrets speaking up during the auction.

programme.title: Storage Wars: One Girl's Trinket Is Another Man's Treasure
programme.desc: Back in Adelanto, Ivy records a hefty find. Brandi and Jarrod test the waters and it pays off big. Mary cranks up her profit to the sweet sound of success.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Buyerina
programme.desc: Back in Orange, Kenny tiptoes down memory lane. Brandi and Jarrod get to work on a tool locker, while Darrell and his granddaughter dig up a creepy find.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Preaching to the Buyer
programme.desc: The buyers are losing their minds in West Covina. Kenny hunts for cougars, but finds a portable pulpit instead. Ivy shows the ladies how to dress for success.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Some Mo' Mr. Nice Guy
programme.desc: It's back to Moreno Valley, where Justin's congeniality earns him Rene's goodwill and a chance to level up; Darrell's tubular locker tests out OK.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Top Meat and Greet
programme.desc: In Riverside, Kenny gets baited into bidding on a massive locker; Rene and Casey try to go small and end up churning out a few bucks, while Shana and Edwina's mystery box is mislabeled.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Whiskers and Lies
programme.desc: In Hawaiian Gardens, Darrell breaks in the new guy. Brandi and Jarrod detect something mysterious in their unit; Justin paws his way through a decent locker.

programme.title: Movie: Bloodsport
programme.desc: An American soldier goes AWOL to compete in an outlawed martial arts competition.

programme.title: Movie: Run All Night
programme.desc: An aging hit man finds his loyalties tested when he's forced to kill the son of his longtime best friend. Now his own estranged son's life is in danger and he must set out on the run.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: All the Wrong Moves
programme.desc: What prop does Murr carry almost daily? Which Jokers danced in their high school musical?

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Uncool and the Gang
programme.desc: What was Sal's fear when Joe poured water in his mouth blindfolded? What punishmnet had producers so scared, they doubled security.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Welcome to Miami
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr, and Q take their talents to Miami pulling all new pranks on the beach. The guys zip around in scooters controlled by the other Jokers, and the loser will come face-to-face with an alligator.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Not Safe for Work
programme.desc: Timing is everything in comedy. The contestants test their comedy on unsuspecting strangers; teach office staff about proper safety techniques and test their luck with online dating profiles.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Captain Fatbelly
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q lend an unhelpful hand while working at a high-tech store, then play detectives at the mall in search of perps on the loose. Tonight's loser gets the shakes while soaring high above the city.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Brother of the Sisterhood
programme.desc: The guys play helpless oddballs in a waiting room, then ask grocery shoppers for cash. Then, tonight's loser becomes the number one enemy of women everywhere.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Washed Up
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr rat each other out at a pizza place and get into textual relationships with strangers at the mall. Then, the big loser twerks hard for the money at an impromptu bikini car wash.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Like a Boss
programme.desc: The jokers act fast and furiously as employees at a theme park and go postal on model citizens who don't realize they're part of the picture. Then, tonight's big loser tumbles and falls after antagonizing a room full of Guy Fieri fans.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Running of the Bullies
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal offer up peculiar specials at a steakhouse and get creepy while helping to clean a prop house. Plus, tonight's big loser realizes he may need his own lifeguard after making waves at the pool.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: The Jokers perform unusual methods of DNA testing and get too close for comfort at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser becomes a shell of a man after he cracks under pressure during a presentation at a children's museum.

programme.title: Movie: Hot Tub Time Machine
programme.desc: Four adult friends in the midst of mid-life crises return to the '80s through a hot tub that's also a time machine. They arrive at a resort and decide they have a chance to change their destinies so they can be happier in their future lives.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Needy and the Greedy

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: The End of Darkness
programme.desc: Sunlight finally returns to the refuge. Heimo's stopped in his tracks by -50 degree temperatures. The Seldens make their home in a new cabin. Bob tries to salvage his worst season in 40 years and questions his future.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Ophelia the Octopus
programme.desc: Two rescued sea lions arrive at the aquarium, and trainers help prepare them for an upcoming eye surgery. The team travels to the Bahamas to research the effects of plastics in the ocean on sharks. The aquarium conducts a study to help wild beluga whales.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Penguins in Love
programme.desc: A staff member heads to the Marine Mammal Center in California to help in rehabilitation efforts of elephant seals. African penguins Charlie and Lizzie have been together for 25 years, and Charlie is having issues with his eyes. A piranha needs surgery.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Baby Otter Rescue
programme.desc: The team welcomes two rescued southern sea otter pups, Mara and Gibson, from the California coast. Young ruddy ducks arrive at the aquarium and are introduced to their new habitat. Nandi, the aquarium's smallest manta ray, is due for her annual checkup.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Dolphin Doctor
programme.desc: Polka, a bottlenose dolphin, has a raspy voice and needs to see the doctor to get the all-clear. Staff excitedly prepare for the upcoming puffin breeding season. Two woebegone sharks are due for a checkup. A curious and active box turtle goes for a walk.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Coral Super Bowl
programme.desc: The staff becomes concerned when Zola, the beloved African penguin falls mysteriously ill. Later, the aquarium witnesses the annual spawning of an endangered coral species, while Maggie the False Map turtle has a date with the dentist.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Big Momma's Surprise
programme.desc: A sea lion called Finn has tummy trouble and the team feeds him a snack that will help them investigate why. Big Mama the guitarfish may be living up to her name, and the boa-duo Ripley and Ridley receive a new home.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Maggie the Magnificent
programme.desc: Technology from California is brought to the aquarium to monitor beluga whale activity. Maggie the Asian small-clawed otter's training kicks in when receiving a shot, and Morty the sea star undergoes a checkup after suspicious growths form.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Four Chicks and Counting
programme.desc: The African penguin colony welcome their newest additions after a successful mating season. Sea otter Mara is introduced to the rest of the raft, and the wild bottlenose dolphin population in Florida is examined.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Ghost Gators
programme.desc: The team is eager to open their new alligator exhibit featuring rare albino gators. Sea otter Gibson is tested for a possible infection, and divers must swim with Taroko the whale shark to get a blood sample.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Expedition Whale Shark
programme.desc: Aquarium staff travel to the remote island of St. Helena to gain footage of whale sharks in their natural habitat during mating season. Spotted ribbontail ray Francis is introduced to her new tank friends, and Cerbie the seal is treated for joint pain.

programme.title: Ice Cold Gold: Adapt or Die
programme.desc: The team discovers devastating news about the ruby deposit they've been working on for a year and a half.

programme.desc: A couple is divided over their 1980s ranch home when one loves the neighborhood but the other wants to ditch their cramped quarters. Hilary must find space to create an entertaining area and a dedicated office, all while keeping their dogs in mind.

programme.title: Love It or List It: Parents and the Pantry
programme.desc: A couple who rushed to buy their first house discover that they don't have the means or space to host their big family gatherings. She wants to find a large, more suitable home for guests, but he thinks the house can be improved to suit all their needs.

programme.title: Love It or List It: This Space Is Looking Up
programme.desc: A couple bought their home ten years ago, but once they became a family of four, they struggled with the size of the house. David searches for a turnkey house, while Hilary designs 'outside the box' to solve all their space challenges.

programme.title: Love It or List It: Don and Quincy's Change of Heart
programme.desc: Hilary loves to chide David whenever she wins a tough challenge, especially when her design decision was so hotly debated. They catch up with Don and Quincy to see if sacrificing a garage in favor of more living space gave them what they needed.

programme.title: Love It or List It: Functioning for Four
programme.desc: Mason and Shannon moved into their 2,000 square foot home in a neighborhood perfect to raise their young son, Luke. After adopting their teenage daughter, Carmen, they felt as though their house may be a little too small for a family of four.

programme.title: Love It or List It: Mid Century Maternity
programme.desc: Busy professionals, Anne and Nathan traded in their high-end condominium for an open living mid-century house. While Nathan loves the form and historic quality of the home, Anne only sees the many problems with its function.

programme.title: House Hunters: Old vs. Cold in Chicago
programme.desc: A young family in Chicago is looking for more space. She wants a sleek, modern home they can move into immediately. However, he is looking for a charming, vintage fixer-upper.

programme.title: House Hunters: Making Her Own Way in Milford
programme.desc: A young Connecticut woman is ready to move out of her childhood home into a place of her own. She wants a condo but her divorced parents each have different opinions.

programme.title: House Hunters: Going Back to Boise
programme.desc: A Los Angeles couple considers returning home to Boise, Idaho, to be closer to family now that they have a young son. He thinks they should wait until his LA job is completed, but she insists they buy in Boise now since the market is poised to explode.

programme.title: House Hunters: My Way or the Rahway
programme.desc: A couple in Rahway, New Jersey, is looking for a new home. She's sick of stairs and wants a one-story ranch that she can fix up, but he's worried about the cost of renovation and would rather have a turnkey with a big backyard.

programme.title: Renovation Inc.: Balancing Act
programme.desc: Bryan must deliver a tough reality check, and Sarah struggles with the clients' design choices.

programme.title: Renovation Inc.: More Than You Can Chew

programme.title: Renovation Inc.: Mind Your Business

programme.title: Renovation Inc.: Starting Off Rocky

programme.title: Good Bones: Battle of the Two Chicks

programme.title: Good Bones: Starting From Scratch in the Southside Neighborhood

programme.title: Good Bones: The Little Brick House

programme.title: Good Bones: A Condo Brings Family Together

programme.title: Good Bones: Free House, Expensive Reno

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York: It's Time to Eat the Fish!

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York: I Ain't Afraid of No Ghosts

programme.title: Unearthed: Seven Wonders of Egypt
programme.desc: Seven wonders of ancient Egypt are home to mysteries still unsolved thousands of years after their construction, and today, investigators use cutting-edge tech and forensic analysis to reveal new secrets of these colossal engineering marvels.

programme.title: Unearthed: Seven Wonders of America
programme.desc: Seven American engineering marvels are among the modern wonders of United States, and now, investigators use hidden records to decode and reveal the mysteries behind these historic American icons.

programme.title: Unearthed: Seven Wonders of America
programme.desc: Seven American engineering marvels are among the modern wonders of United States, and now, investigators use hidden records to decode and reveal the mysteries behind these historic American icons.

programme.title: Unearthed: Seven Wonders: Episode 6
programme.desc: Decoding the mysteries behind iconic structures and monuments around the world.

programme.title: Mummy Mysteries: Fake or Pharaoh?
programme.desc: A dusty exhibit from an oddities museum in Niagara Falls could be a genuine long-lost pharaoh from Egypt's most-iconic dynasty. A team of experts re-examine the evidence to reveal how a legendary king ended up on the other side of the world.

programme.title: Unearthed: Seven Wonders: Episode 6
programme.desc: Decoding the mysteries behind iconic structures and monuments around the world.

programme.title: Mummy Mysteries: Fake or Pharaoh?

programme.title: Unearthed: Seven Wonders: Episode 6

programme.title: What on Earth?: Lost City of the Kalahari
programme.desc: Satellites spot strange spiral markings in the remote African desert. A weird deadly black blob is threatening the Florida Keys. Something massive found deep beneath the ice of Antarctica.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Secret of Doomsday Mountain
programme.desc: Satellites discover American stealth technology deep inside China. An unidentified cloud swamps America's skis. Finally, something truly massive is lurking beneath Loch Ness.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Finding Vietnam's Lost POWs
programme.desc: Stories on this episode include desperate signs from lost veterans in Vietnam captured by satellite, a fleet of massive ships stranded in the middle of a vast desert and strange walls stretching vast distances across Northern California.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Curse of the Lost Kingdom
programme.desc: Stories on this episode include the face of Christ is found in a field in Hungary, a photo that claims to show who shot down a passenger jet in Ukraine and a sinister shape in the mountains of Afghanistan that leads investigators to a hidden genocide.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Hidden Tomb of Genghis Khan
programme.desc: A strange structure is found in the heartlands of Mongolia. Find out if it is the lost tomb of Genghis Khan. Bizarre rings in Spain could lead to the lost city of Atlantis and a huge floating island is on a collision course with New Zealand.

programme.title: The Planets and Beyond: Alien Volcanoes: Life in Hell
programme.desc: Mike uses the latest science to explore the alien volcanoes of distant worlds and reveals if they are hotbeds for extraterrestrial life.

programme.title: The Planets and Beyond: Alien Stars: Mystery of the Monsters
programme.desc: Astronaut Mike Massimino journeys to the deadliest stars in the universe, and though these terrifying suns can rip planets apart, they might be integral to life on earth.

programme.title: The Planets and Beyond: Alien Moons: The Next Earth
programme.desc: Astronaut Mike Massimino journeys to the alien moons of our solar system, and discovers if these strange worlds could be habitable for life beyond earth.

programme.title: The Planets and Beyond: Mercury: The Cursed Planet
programme.desc: Astronaut Mike Massimino explores Mercury, a deadly and tiny planet that faces constant attacks from the Sun, and which might one day pose a threat to all life on Earth.

programme.title: The Planets and Beyond: The Sun: Secrets of Our Star
The Planets and Beyond: Comets: Mysteries from the Deep
programme.desc: Astronaut Mike Massimino reveals the alien secrets of comets, strange visitors from deep space that might be responsible for life on Earth.

programme.title: The Planets and Beyond: Ice Giants: The Frozen Aliens
The Planets and Beyond: Ends of the Solar System: Strange Frontiers
programme.desc: Astronaut Mike Massimino uses the latest NASA discoveries to explore the dark and mysterious frontiers of our solar system.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Mountain of Madness
programme.desc: A wealthy executive comes into conflict with his neighbors when he forbids them access to his extensive lands. One local handyman fights to keep the roads and trails open for all, a struggle that ends when one man lies dead.

programme.title: Brittany Murphy: An ID Mystery
programme.desc: Drugs, disease and scandals when Hollywood superstar Brittany Murphy dies at age 32, the world is stunned. Many believe foul play must be involved. Brittany's father searches for answers as lurid allegations against other family members mount.

programme.title: Joe Exotic: Tigers, Lies and Cover-Up: Team Tiger
programme.desc: Oklahoma wild animal zookeeper Joe Exotic fights to get out of prison and intensifies his feud with Carole Baskin, while the jury foreman exclusively explains the guilty verdict and an investigation reveals Carole's husband's will may be a forgery.

programme.title: Joe Exotic: Tigers, Lies and Cover-Up: Into the Eye of the Tiger
programme.desc: An ex-boyfriend believes Carole cares more about her animals than most people, while a former homicide cop explores property transfers from Carole to handyman Kenneth Farr and searches a lake for Don's body and a meat grinder.

programme.title: Joe Exotic: Tigers, Lies and Cover-Up: Catch a Tiger by the Tail
programme.desc: Joe Exotic seeks a presidential pardon and keeps his spirits buoyed behind bars with the love of his husband and fan letters, as Don Lewis's handyman is confronted with allegations about his disappearance and Don's family seeks answers and closure.

programme.title: Joe Exotic: Before He Was King
programme.desc: Watch an investigation into the backstory of the self-proclaimed 'Tiger King.' Learn what sent Joe down a path of depravity and ultimately, conspiracy to commit murder. Every lead will be evaluated as we claw our way to the truth.

programme.title: Joe Exotic: Tigers, Lies and Cover-Up: Team Tiger
programme.desc: Oklahoma wild animal zookeeper Joe Exotic fights to get out of prison and intensifies his feud with Carole Baskin, while the jury foreman exclusively explains the guilty verdict and an investigation reveals Carole's husband's will may be a forgery.

programme.title: Joe Exotic: Tigers, Lies and Cover-Up: Into the Eye of the Tiger
programme.desc: An ex-boyfriend believes Carole cares more about her animals than most people, while a former homicide cop explores property transfers from Carole to handyman Kenneth Farr and searches a lake for Don's body and a meat grinder.

programme.title: Joe Exotic: Tigers, Lies and Cover-Up: Catch a Tiger by the Tail
programme.desc: Joe Exotic seeks a presidential pardon and keeps his spirits buoyed behind bars with the love of his husband and fan letters, as Don Lewis's handyman is confronted with allegations about his disappearance and Don's family seeks answers and closure.

programme.title: Joe Exotic: Before He Was King
programme.desc: Watch an investigation into the backstory of the self-proclaimed 'Tiger King.' Learn what sent Joe down a path of depravity and ultimately, conspiracy to commit murder. Every lead will be evaluated as we claw our way to the truth.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Killer Cougars
programme.desc: Some women can't resist bad boys, but when the fur flies, these women reveal their deadly side.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Lover's Revenge
programme.desc: When these women were betrayed, they demanded payback. A crazed mother took a custody battle too far, a scorned lover wiped out her competition, and a sex addict stepped on everyone in her way.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Cash In
programme.desc: The stakes are high and the chips are down when these Deadly Women decide to 'Cash In.'

programme.title: Web of Lies: Job of a Lifetime
programme.desc: Unemployed David Pauley applies to a Craigslist ad offering a tantalizing lifeline just as the recession hits. The job sounds perfect: a live-in caretaker for a ranch in Ohio. But just as soon as he is hired, he disappears - and he isn't the first.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Crowded House
programme.desc: Lonely teen Jessica Sacco turns to the internet to find other so-called 'Juggalos' who share her interests in edgy music. There, she makes new friends and even finds a boyfriend. She moves in with them, and soon finds herself unable to escape their grip.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Farmville Horror
programme.desc: When teenager Emma and 20 year old Sam meet online, Emma thinks she's found love. But when Sam comes to visit she sees he's not at all the boy she imagined. Emma rejects her admirer and he takes it badly, placing Emma and her family in mortal danger.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Age, Sex, Location
programme.desc: 13 year-old Kacie Woody meets two male friends via the internet – Scott, from Atlanta; and Dave, a surfing enthusiast from California. But one of these boys is not what he seems, as Kacie's innocent online contacts turn to tragedy.

programme.title: Deadly Secrets: A Killer Hand
programme.desc: A teen embarks on a journey to bring justice to the killer of his family, but must succeed before someone else dies.

programme.title: Deadly Secrets: Killer Colleagues
programme.desc: Zoe Pulver and Jane Long have great jobs working for Ashley Pollow, a talented tax attorney in Florida. But Ashley also has a violent temper, and when a grisly murder takes place at the office, Jane and Zoe find themselves way too close to the killer.

programme.title: Deadly Secrets: The Truth Hurts
programme.desc: A man is caught up in deception and lies after an affair with another man's wife. Two men will die and a family will be torn apart. An older brother and uncle do what they can to uncover who the killer is.

programme.title: Betrayed: The Body in the Cornfield
programme.desc: Barbara Keim is juggling two ex-husbands and a rebellious teenage daughter with a questionable circle of friends. When Barbara goes missing, her sisters fear the worst.

programme.title: Betrayed: Welcome to the Murderhood
programme.desc: 40-year-old Priscilla Strole is looking for a fresh start when she and her teenage son Kyle move to the small town of Fairfield, California. Little does she know, new beginnings lead to her untimely end.

programme.title: Betrayed: Suited for Murder
programme.desc: After two kids and two divorces, Charleston, West Virginia native Kathy Goble was making herself a priority for the first time in her life. However, her carefree ways soon catch up to her and she is betrayed in the most brutal way possible.

programme.title: Betrayed: Killing with Kindness
programme.desc: Kind-hearted cashier Elizabeth Grosskopf scoops up human strays like puppies until one wants more than just food and shelter, but also her life.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Bombing the Reich
programme.desc: Devastation touches the civilians of Germany. With the U.S. as a newly engaged Ally, western forces bring the war to the Axis front, but at extreme costs.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: U-Boat Terror
programme.desc: The global reach of the war reveals itself, as the incredible stories of those at sea are heard. Relentless attacks by U-Boats push the British to develop new strategies to defeat this evil empire.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Defying the Nazis
programme.desc: We all think the U.S. started fighting the Nazi's after the Pearl Harbour attacks, but what you don't know are the stories behind some of the biggest deceptions, the top secrets and the secret weapons used to help defy the Nazis in WWII.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases: Conspiracy on Death Island
programme.desc: A strange, abandoned mansion on a remote island is central to countless conspiracy theories, and new discoveries reveal if this eerie site was a secret Nazi base intended for a sinister mission.

programme.title: Nazi Secret Files: Mad Science: Nazi Killer Bugs
programme.desc: Hitler famously said he was against biological weapons, but new evidence shows the Nazis were colluding with experts on germ warfare. They had a deadly plan to launch a disease attack on the Allies that could have even changed the course of the war.

programme.title: Nazi Secret Files: Hitler's Messiah Complex
programme.desc: The story of how an unremarkable drifter from Vienna instigated the most devastating military conflict in the history of the world. Explore how a series of psychotic episodes in his early life convinced Adolf Hitler he was a modern-day Pharaoh.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases: Conspiracy on Death Island
programme.desc: A strange, abandoned mansion on a remote island is central to countless conspiracy theories, and new discoveries reveal if this eerie site was a secret Nazi base intended for a sinister mission.

programme.title: Nazi Secret Files: Mad Science: Nazi Killer Bugs
programme.desc: Hitler famously said he was against biological weapons, but new evidence shows the Nazis were colluding with experts on germ warfare. They had a deadly plan to launch a disease attack on the Allies that could have even changed the course of the war.

programme.title: Nazi Secret Files: Hitler's Messiah Complex
programme.desc: The story of how an unremarkable drifter from Vienna instigated the most devastating military conflict in the history of the world. Explore how a series of psychotic episodes in his early life convinced Adolf Hitler he was a modern-day Pharaoh.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Defying the Nazis
programme.desc: We all think the U.S. started fighting the Nazi's after the Pearl Harbour attacks, but what you don't know are the stories behind some of the biggest deceptions, the top secrets and the secret weapons used to help defy the Nazis in WWII.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: U-Boat Terror
programme.desc: The global reach of the war reveals itself, as the incredible stories of those at sea are heard. Relentless attacks by U-Boats push the British to develop new strategies to defeat this evil empire.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: The Devil Incarnate
programme.desc: Born in Honduras, Juan Ramon Matta Ballesteros became one of the richest cocaine smugglers in history. Ballesteros masterminded a supply route into the US, which fed much of the cocaine and crack epidemic of the 70's and 80's.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Operation White Terror
programme.desc: It's the most daring sting ever mounted by the FBI. On November 5th, 2002 agent Mark Kirby lures ruthless AUC terrorists out of their lair in the jungle and takes them down in a hotel car park in San Jose, Costa Rica.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Colombian Rambo
programme.desc: In 1980 the trickle of cocaine coming in to Florida suddenly becomes a flood and drug wars erupt on the streets. Carlos Lehder is behind it all. The DEA must take him down before he destroys the USA with the drug he calls Latin America's 'atomic bomb'.

programme.title: Deadliest Tech: Armor
programme.desc: A look at the most advanced armor technologies, from body armor to the heavy duty composites that make the Abrams tank the best protected and the most lethal vehicle on the modern battlefield.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: The Ma Deuce
programme.desc: Nicknamed the 'Ma Deuce', this fifty caliber American machine gun has been rocking the battlefield for over eighty years. Host Wil Willis puts this legendary weapon to the ultimate test.

programme.title: Deadliest Tech: Bombers
programme.desc: Go inside the most dominant and lethal military aircraft. Including the bombers that won the war to the B-52, the stealth B-2 to the most advanced and top secret bombers of the future.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Victory in Europe
programme.desc: As 1945 began, Hitler's Third Reich was entering its death throes. In the west, Allied forces were within striking distance of the Rhine. In the east, a Red Army blitzkrieg brought Soviet forces to the River Oder just an hour's drive from Berlin.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Bombing the Reich
programme.desc: Devastation touches the civilians of Germany. With the U.S. as a newly engaged Ally, western forces bring the war to the Axis front, but at extreme costs.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: A Culture of Control
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to change the way German people think and feel by creating a new, Nazi form of art and culture. He takes over the film industry and radio stations, giving the Nazis complete control over every image and message his people receive.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Hitler's Highways
programme.desc: Hitler promises to make Germany great again by creating 14,000 miles of freeway and building one and half million 'People's Cars' every year. Instead, the Nazi war economy relies on millions of forced labourers and prisoners.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Retreat from Reality
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler is determined to fight to the very end, even if it costs millions of Germans their lives. He puts his faith in his the 'Wunderwaffe' and the 'wonder weapons,' including the first ever ballistic missile, the V2.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Making Memories in Maryland

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Duplex Conversion

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Building Alaska: The Race Is On: The Builders Set Their Course
programme.desc: Three men set out to build three cabins in remote areas of the Alaskan Frontier. They will make preparations in the harsh Alaskan winter and race against time, the bitter cold, and the wilderness to complete their builds.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Grip It and Rip It
programme.desc: As the summer season starts to thaw out in Alaska, the builders get underway. The Alaskan elements are stubborn at all three build sites, but a little ingenuity goes a long way.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Chicken or Bust
programme.desc: Lee Raymond is struggling to get back on track after losing a month to bad weather. Meanwhile, Chuck had has perfect weather, but most of his labor is due to leave in less than a month so he's got to move hard and fast.

programme.title: Building Alaska: A Long Hard Slog
programme.desc: After battling the tragedy of the loss of his right-hand man, Ryan Beachy, Chuck Gerwig is back in the saddle and ready to finish the job that he and Ryan started months earlier.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Downward Slide
programme.desc: As the days get shorter and colder, and snow is visible on the highest peaks, the builders frantically race to get their homes sealed in.

programme.title: Building Alaska: The End Game
programme.desc: Winter has arrived and the race is over. It's time for each of our builders to come to terms with their end games as they pack up and head home for the season. To say this year has been a challenge would be an understatement.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Piece En Piece
programme.desc: The builders learn some new skills when Mark Bowe buys a cabin with a strange design called Piece en Piece.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Lone Star Boneyard
programme.desc: Mark Bowe and the crew start a new boneyard in Texas by building a timber frame barn and two log cabins with some help from their new business partner. Mark gets his first look at the incredible party barn they built the last time they were in Texas.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Modern Mansion Makeover
programme.desc: The builders give a modern mansion a complete log cabin makeover. They use log skins and a stacked log entryway. The pressure's on as the home will be the centerpiece of an entire log cabin community. Mark also tours a restored pioneer cabin.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Battle-Ready
programme.desc: Mark Bowe and his assistant, Katherine, work in Texas while the guys build a cabin in Virginia with their favorite crane operator, Mark Battle.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Best BBQ
programme.desc: Casey's quest for America's best bites has taken him from coast to coast, and it's about time we started celebrating the cream of the crop. Fire up the grill, because this time we’re inducting the Best BBQ in the history of Man V. Food.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Absolute Cheesiest
programme.desc: Casey’s criss-crossed the country chowing down on the best eats American has to offer, and its time to honour the best of the best by inducting the top five absolute cheesiest dishes in Man vs. Food history into our Hall of Fame.

programme.title: Good Eats: Soups On
programme.desc: Chef/Scientist Alton Brown serves up soup that children of all ages will love.

programme.title: Good Eats: The Big Chili
programme.desc: Join Host and cowpoke Gerald P Hobbs (Alton Brown) and his sidekick Rusty as they rustle up a good, honest bowl of red. Along the way, they'll ponder the chili mythology, grind up their own chili powder (that's chili with an i) and do some serious work.

programme.title: Good Eats: Melondrama
programme.desc: Alton demystifies one of the most complex fruits around: the melon.

programme.title: Good Eats: Puddin' Head Blues
programme.desc: An investigation into the origins and secrets of pudding.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Los Angeles
programme.desc: Los Angeles, California, is the capital of stardom, and that includes its cuisine. In a city known for such edible icons as Korean tacos and the L.A. street dog, Andrew Zimmern explores just what makes this destination so delicious.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: San Francisco
programme.desc: Look no further than San Francisco, California for the best eating on the West Coast. Built on classics like Dungeness Crab Louie and sourdough bread, Andrew Zimmern discovers just what makes the City by the Bay so delectable.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: Birmingham
programme.desc: Andrew travels to Birmingham, Alabama, home to one of the fastest growing food scenes in America. From the state's signature barbecue to innovative takes on Southern cuisine, he gets a taste of what makes the Magic City so unique.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Jamaica
programme.desc: In a country celebrated for its colorful culture, Jamaica's heritage-rich food lives up to the hype. Andrew Zimmern explores island icons from jerk chicken and mannish water soup, to curry goat, blue mountain coffee, and gizzadas.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Puerto Vallarta
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern heads to Mexico's Pacific coast and the resort town of Puerto Vallarta to explore the local cuisine. He finds local favorites reimagined to the delight of visitors, like grilled flour tortillas topped with marinated pork roast.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Mississippi Delta
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the iconic soul food of the Mississippi Delta. From fried catfish and hushpuppies to smothered oxtails and decadent mud pie, the Deep South's down-home dishes soothe the soul.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Kansas City
programme.desc: Andrew visits Kansas City, where he discovers a swirled Croatian dessert bread and a locally-made marshmallow chocolate candy.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Trinidad And Tobago
programme.desc: Andrew samples the island flavors and culinary mashups of Trinidad and Tobago. These islands have a passion for food and life, featuring dishes like curried crab with dumplings, crispy fried shark sandwiches and soft and silky flatbreads.

programme.title: The Circus: Inside the Craziest Political Campaign on Earth: Full Court Press

programme.title: The Comey Rule: Night One
programme.desc: James Comey interviews with President Obama and gets the job of a lifetime, Director of the FBI. But two years into his tenure, the Bureau is plunged into two hugely controversial cases: Midterm Exam, the investigation into Hillary Clinton's emails.

programme.title: The Comey Rule: Night Two
programme.desc: James Comey awakens on November 9, 2016, now known nationally as 'the man who got Donald Trump elected.' With that hanging over him, he now must try to find a way to work with the new President.

programme.title: The Circus: Inside the Craziest Political Campaign on Earth: Full Court Press
programme.desc: The Circus profiles the life and legacy of Ruth Bader Ginsburg. Eager to capitalize on her now vacant seat, key conservatives have pushed to confirm a nomination before a new president is sworn in, while progressives strongly object.

programme.title: Our Cartoon President: Debate Prep

programme.desc: A man searches for the men who harvested his heart and replaced it with an artificial, battery-operated one. He must find his real heart and a doctor to implant it before his artificial one stops.

programme.title: Movie: The Truman Show

programme.title: Movie: Mean Girls
programme.desc: A new student is a hit with the popular crowd until she falls for the wrong guy.

programme.title: Movie: Good Will Hunting

programme.desc: A drifter in a post-apocalyptic society travels across America, protecting the last copy of the King James Bible in order to deliver it to the west coast so it can help save humanity. However, an evil gang lord seeks to take the book for himself.

programme.title: Movie: The Equalizer
programme.desc: A former black ops commando falls under the radar of the Russian mob when he helps a girl who's living under their control. With a hatred for those who prey on the helpless, he summons hidden skills to see justice realized.

programme.title: Movie: 2 Guns
programme.desc: After a bank robbery, two men find themselves in the middle of a corruption scheme as they are blackmailed and hunted by both sides of the law.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: A navy lieutenant commander in impeccable shape turns to Pride and the team to solve his imminent murder after discovering he has been poisoned with a lethal dose of radiation.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Careful What You Wish For
programme.desc: After an NCIS agent is killed during security detail for the Vice Chief of Naval Operations, the team must determine if this was assassination or if someone is targeting one of their own. Meanwhile, Agent Brody is placed under investigation.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Le Carnivale de la Mort

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: My Brother's Keeper

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: More Now

programme.desc: Thirty-seven-year-old Kelly Stonerock, a God-fearing pastor's wife from Michigan, travels to Georgia to swap places with thirty-year-old Amber Finley the wife of an atheist disc jockey.

programme.title: Wife Swap: Roy/ Maness
programme.desc: A clean-freak mother who controls her family with iron fists changes lives with a construction worker mom whose family enjoys burping contests and partying.

programme.title: Wife Swap: Stamper/ Haggerty
programme.desc: A mom whose heart is in the medieval past and whose head is in the clouds swaps places with a 21st century wife and mother who juggles family life and works two jobs.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seedy Intentions
programme.desc: When a nine-year-old girl goes missing, police and volunteers spend weeks searching for her. A psychic’s vision leads to a field where her body is discovered, along with what investigators hope is enough evidence to help them to also find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: DNA Dragnet
programme.desc: Security camera video shows that what appears to be a casual encounter is actually a forced abduction, leading to murder. The perpetrator’s MO is remarkably similar to another murder which occurred five months earlier only 15 miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Van-ished
programme.desc: A twelve-year-old girl claimed she had been abducted and sexually assaulted. She recounted what happened in such a flat, unemotional voice that police found it difficult to believe her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Novel Idea
programme.desc: When a frantic call from a man claiming his wife fell down the stairs brings investigators to their home, they are concerned by the unusually large number of bloodstains, and how big they are.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Chief Suspect
programme.desc: The wife of a police officer is murdered in her own home. After a decade a newly formed cold case unit took a new look at the case, and using a fragment of a 911 call, they caught the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Water Hazard
programme.desc: The victim had ingested a massive amount of cyanide. An unlikely clue, a flaw on a mailing envelope, exposed a murderer who was willing to kill innocent people to get the one person he wanted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen Assets
programme.desc: When a respected business owner is brutally attacked and killed, investigators have to determine if it was a robbery gone wrong or a calculated murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: House Hunting
programme.desc: When a successful real estate agent is brutally murdered, panicked townspeople begin looking over their shoulders and locking their doors.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shoot to Thrill
programme.desc: A teenager returns home after a night out with friends, and discovers his father's body lying in a pool of blood.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Political Thriller
programme.desc: When a Nevada politician dies in the midst of a cutthroat re-election campaign, the only clue investigators have to go on are the tiny punctures on her skin. As they dig deeper, they hone in upon the deceased's husband, a critical care nurse.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Web of Seduction
programme.desc: When the scene of a murder proves to be completely bare of evidence, computer forensics experts manage to dig up files on the victim's computer, and those of his wife and her lover that finger a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Root of All Evil
programme.desc: Prosecutors turned to a plant pathologist and a dendrochronologist to solve a missing person's case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: The Kristine Fitzhugh Case - A woman is found dead in her home and it seems like an accidental fall down the stairs is to blame. When a pathologist discovers the death was no accident, police suspect it may have been a burglary gone wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Three's a Crowd
programme.desc: As she left choir practice, the woman was gunned down in the church parking lot. Her husband became the prime suspect, particularly when police learned he found out just a month earlier that his wife had been cheating on him for three years.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All 'Butt' Certain
programme.desc: A woman is convinced her husband is innocent of murder and conducted her own investigation to prove it.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Jean Pool
programme.desc: When new DNA technology becomes available, cold case investigators in Tennessee think they'll finally be able to find out who killed a local college student.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Traffic Violations
programme.desc: When a young woman is found dead police immediately focus their attention on her husband. Not until they examine cell phone records and a unique shoe print do they realize the real killer has been a bit too close for comfort the entire time.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherly Love
programme.desc: A young man devotes his life to law enforcement after his sister is brutally murdered. In the end, a brother's love - and a new scientific tool - unlocks the mystery behind an age old case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Drowning Sorrows

programme.desc: Marty endeavors to carve a road up 300-foot cliffs, while Misty enlists help to build a predator-proof chicken coop. Then, Misty plots a supersized greenhouse to feed three generations, while Matt and Marty acquire the family's first sawmill.

programme.title: Dodgeball Thunderdome: The Hits Keep Coming

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Escobar's Castle

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Pompeii's Gate to Hell

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of Cliff City

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Jungle of the Damned

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Kingdom of the Vanished
programme.desc: A mysterious town in the hills of South Africa was once a booming community, but today, the eerie place is deserted. Experts reveal the cataclysm that caused the people of this once-prosperous town to suddenly leave and never come back.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Journey to Outcast Island
programme.desc: On a desolate island near Greece, abandoned buildings are evidence of a group of people that were forbidden to leave. Experts reveal who was forced to stay here and if there was a cover-up to conceal what really happened at this strange place.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned

programme.desc: The air in the Shark Tank gets emotionally charged between the Sharks and a daring entrepreneur, when one of the Sharks is willing to part with four million dollars of his own money for a business, the largest sum ever on the show.

programme.title: Beyond the Tank
programme.desc: Robert Herjavec rolls up his sleeves to help guide San Diego entrepreneurs Evan Melsohn and Nick Morton, the 'Tipsy Elves' business duo from Season 5. They find themselves at a crossroads when it comes to branding their clothing design company.

programme.title: Dateline NBC: In the Middle of the Night
programme.desc: Angie Samota is murdered in her dorm. The stabbing shows lots of rage, giving police a clue: it must be someone close to Angie. Police question everyone close to Angie, but get nowhere. Decades pass and a college friend urges police to take another look.

programme.title: Dateline NBC: Missing Marie
programme.desc: Marie Singleton who worked for the CIA vanishes. Police follow all leads even considering it might be espionage related. Case remained unsolved for years until one day Marie's son Marcus, now a grown man, unleashes a memory of his mother's killer.

programme.title: Street Signs
programme.desc: A one hour view into Europe's equity session, providing price discovery, the street's view, instant analysis and a link to the business stories trending online and on social, breaking down key economic data in Europe.

programme.title: Worldwide Exchange
programme.desc: This worldwide, daily business program is anchored from New York, London and Singapore.

programme.title: Squawk Box
programme.desc: The business day with live reports from investment banks and the New York Stock Exchange.

programme.title: Squawk on the Street

programme.title: Squawk Alley
programme.desc: Topics related to the intersection of Wall Street and technology are discussed.

programme.title: Fast Money Halftime Report

programme.title: The Exchange

programme.title: Power Lunch

programme.title: Closing Bell

programme.title: The Loud House: Cover Girls/ Save the Date

programme.title: The Loud House: Pulp Friction/ Pets Peeved
programme.desc: Lincoln and Clyde submit an Ace Savvy comic to a meet-the-creator contest, but are foiled by a surprising nemesis. When Lana brings home a new pet, who the kids adore, the four original Loud pets scheme to get rid of him.

programme.title: The Loud House: Roll Model With the Casagrandes/ No Show With the Casagrandes
programme.desc: When Carl witnesses Ronnie Anne save a dog, he becomes obsessed with being just like his newfound hero. Ronnie Anne secretly starts watching her family's favorite tv show after refusing to watch it with them.

programme.title: The Loud House: Yes Man/ Friend or Faux
programme.desc: The sisters ask Lincoln to teach them how to ask Mom and Dad for money. Lisa gets her report card and finds she failed social skills and must make a friend to get her grade up.

programme.title: The Loud House: Stage Plight/Antiqued Off
programme.desc: Hoping to get closer to her crush, Benny, Luan tries out for the school play. When Clyde and schoolmate Zach bond over antiques, Lincoln finds himself feeling like a third wheel.

programme.title: The Loud House: A Dark and Story Night/ Sand Hassles

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Rachel Goes Back to Work

programme.desc: Rachel is steamed when she learns that Monica invited her workplace rival to her party.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Survival of the Idiots/ Dumped

programme.title: Group Chat With Jayden and Brent: Party Time, Wrap Battle
programme.desc: Jayden Bartels and Brent Rivera pop balloons with their butts, pin the tie on Spongebob, and make a cheesy mess with special guests, Nickelodeon star Young Dylan and rapper That Girl Lay Lay.
